title: Ecommerce Manager (Ebay and more)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented eBay Operations Assistant to help manage and grow our online store. This is a long-term opportunity for someone who is disciplined, proactive, and eager to develop their skills in e-commerce.



Key Responsibilities:



*Create and upload product listings on eBay

*Write SEO-optimized titles and descriptions

*Upload and organize product images

*Monitor store activity and performance

*Respond to customer inquiries in a timely and professional manner

*Handle customer support and order-related issues

*Follow instructions carefully and execute tasks with consistency

*Assist with other operational tasks as needed





Requirements:



*Strong written and spoken English

*Ability to follow instructions and work independently

*High level of discipline, consistency, and attention to detail

*Availability to work full-time during US business hours (this is not negotiable)

*Basic familiarity with AI tools 

*Prior experience in e-commerce, product listing, or customer support is a plus.



What We’re Looking For:



*Someone dependable who treats this as a serious, long-term role

*Strong work ethic and accountability

*Willingness to learn and grow within the company



How to Apply:



Please submit the following:



*Your resume

*Your WhatsApp number

*A short video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself, including:  Your background and experience

*Any relevant experience with e-commerce or online work

*Why you’re interested in this role and why we should hire YOU!

title: Podcast & Short-Form Video Editor

nts from long-form podcasts, we want to meet you.

While we produce full podcast episodes, the most valuable content to our clients are the short-form highlight videos that become the face of their brand on social media.

We’re currently hiring multiple full-time remote editors who can help us deliver high-quality, on-brand, impactful content that not only looks amazing—but moves the needle.



What You’ll Be Doing:

This Role Is For You If You:

Can instinctively identify powerful 
nts in podcast episodes that are likely to perform well on Instagram, YouTube Shorts, TikTok, or LinkedIn

Tools & Tech You’ll Use:

Position Details:

Part-Time (Remote)

Long-term opportunity with room to grow inside the agency





Why This Role Matters:

Our clients are not just making content for content’s sake. They are visionary leaders—entrepreneurs, coaches, speakers, and authors—who rely on us to help them turn their voice into visibility and their message into 
ntum.

Grow their audience



Build trust and authority



Generate leads and sales from their podcast



=

That’s why we’re looking for A players only. Editors who think like marketers. Creatives who can spot the clip that will stop the scroll. Professionals who want to elevate every project—not just get it done.



To Apply:

Your resume and portfolio link

A quick note telling us why you're the perfect fit for The Good in Media (show us your personality!)

title: Expert Video Editor
description:
We’re looking for a talented video editor to join our growing YouTube team. This role is for someone to join as soon as possible. 



About the Role

You’ll be editing 2 videos per week of approx 12-18 minutes. These are documentary-style YouTube videos focused on commercial aviation: 



Each project includes:

- A provided script and voiceover

- Clear creative direction

- Templates for all motion graphics (Premier pro & after effects) so you can follow the established visual style on the channel



But you’ll be expected to bring the footage and storytelling to life.



What You’ll Be Doing:

- Edit full-length YouTube videos using scripts and voiceovers we provide

- Source highly relevant aviation footage and images. 

- Implement motion graphics using provided templates to ensure style consistency 

- Add sound design and audio mixing to elevate the storytelling

- Apply transitions and visual pacing techniques to keep viewer attention high

- Optimize for YouTube retention, with engaging visuals, cuts, and structure

Requirements: 

- 1-2+ years of proficiency in professional video editing software, including Adobe Premiere Pro & Adobe After Effects

- Experience with GEOlayers, or the ability to learn

- Strong motion graphics skills

- Great attention to detail in both video and sound

- A self-starter who can work independently and deliver consistent, high-quality work



What We Provide:

- Scripts and voiceovers for every video

- Access to Storyblocks for stock footage and Epidemicsound for audio. 

- A collaborative environment with consistent, ongoing work

- Prompt feedback and a clear production calendar



How to Apply:

Send us:

- A short note introducing yourself and your experience

- A portfolio or samples of relevant work (ideally YouTube videos with documentary-style editing)



If selected, we will be in touch! If you're passionate about planes and know how to tell a compelling visual story, this is the role for you.



We’re excited to hear from you!

title: Real Estate Transaction & Listing Coordinator
description:
Real Estate Transaction & Listing Coordinator



Legacy Home Group (LHG) | Full-Time



Help keep our listings and transactions moving with excellence.



Legacy Home Group is seeking additional Transaction & Listing Support to help our team maintain a high standard of service from signed listing agreement to closing. This role is ideal for someone who is organized, proactive, detail-oriented, and confident managing multiple moving parts at once.



You will support both the listing side and the transaction side of the business, helping ensure timelines are met, documents are accurate, communication stays clear, and nothing falls through the cracks. This is a critical operations role for someone who enjoys structure, follow-through, and helping agents and clients have a smooth experience.



In this role, you will:

Support listing files from signed agreement through active listing launch

Help ensure listing documentation is complete, accurate, and submitted on time

Coordinate timelines, task follow-up, and status updates for listings and transactions

Assist with MLS-related preparation, listing input coordination, and listing detail review

Monitor contract-to-close milestones and help keep files moving forward

Communicate with agents, clients, title, mortgage, inspectors, and other parties as needed

Maintain accurate notes, documents, and status updates in our systems and transaction platforms

Review files for completeness, missing signatures, deadlines, and compliance-related details

Help track escrow, inspection, appraisal, financing, and closing milestones

Provide operational support to agents so they can stay focused on client service and production

Escalate issues quickly when timelines, documents, or communication need attention



What success looks like:

Listings are launched accurately and efficiently

Transaction files stay organized and on schedule

Deadlines are tracked carefully and followed through consistently

Agents feel supported and informed

Clients and partners experience professional, timely communication

File quality remains high and details are caught early



You may be a strong fit if you:

Are highly organized and naturally detail-oriented

Can manage multiple files and deadlines without losing accuracy

Communicate clearly and professionally in writing, by phone, and internally with the team

Take ownership of follow-up instead of waiting to be reminded

Work well in a process-driven environment

Stay calm under pressure and can pivot when priorities change

Understand that strong operations create a better client experience



Preferred qualifications:

Experience in real estate transaction coordination, listing coordination, or administrative support

Familiarity with listing paperwork, contract timelines, and contract-to-close workflows

Experience with CRM platforms, Google Workspace, and transaction management systems

Florida real estate operations experience is a plus



Important notes about the role:

This role supports both listing coordination and transaction coordination

This is a detail-heavy, deadline-driven position

Strong follow-up and file management are essential

Candidates should be comfortable working behind the scenes to keep operations running smoothly



Why LHG:

Legacy Home Group is committed to providing a professional, well-supported environment for both clients and agents. We believe excellent service is built on strong systems, clear communication, and consistent follow-through. This role is a key part of that standard and directly contributes to the experience our clients and agents have with our brand.



Apply:

If you are process-driven, dependable, and take pride in keeping details organized from start to finish, we would love to hear from you.

title: PRO VIDEO EDITOR
description:
???? VIDEO EDITOR POSITION (HIGH-LEVEL | LONG & SHORT FORM CONTENT)



We are looking for a high-level video editor to join a fast-growing personal brand focused on fitness, mindset, and transformation content. This is not basic editing. This is storytelling, emotion, retention, and impact. If you are someone who takes pride in your work, obsesses over details, and wants to be part of something meaningful—keep reading.



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING:

 • Edit 2–3 long-form YouTube videos per week (10–20 minutes each)

 • Edit 7 short-form videos per week (YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Instagram Reels,
 Reels — one per day)

 • Transform raw footage into engaging, high-retention content

 • Add motion graphics, captions, sound effects, B-roll, zooms, pacing, and strong visual storytelling elements

 • Repurpose long-form content into multiple short-form clips

 • Help organize video topics and content workflow to ensure a consistent and smooth flow of content each week

 • Maintain structure, consistency, and 
ntum in the content pipeline



?? SCHEDULE & AVAILABILITY:

 • Full-time position (Monday through Friday)

 • Must be available and working during New York City (Eastern Time) hours

 • Consistent communication and responsiveness during working hours is required



OWNERSHIP ROLE:

This is not just a freelance position. You will be treated as a key part of the team. We are building something meaningful, and your work directly impacts the growth of the brand and the lives we reach. We are looking for someone who takes ownership, brings ideas, and wants to grow with us long-term.



Every single video matters. Every piece of content is an opportunity to impact and transform someone’s life. You are not just editing—you are helping deliver a message that people truly need.



THIS IS FOR YOU IF YOU:

 • Have proven experience editing YouTube content (long-form and short-form)

 • Are skilled in motion graphics (After Effects or similar)

 • Are extremely detail-oriented (nothing sloppy gets past you)

 • Understand viewer psychology and retention editing

 • Are organized and can manage content flow efficiently

 • Have a positive, energized, growth-oriented mindset

 • Take pride in your work and bring strong energy to what you do

 • Are reliable and consistently meet deadlines

 • Take ownership instead of just completing tasks

 • Are not overloaded with dozens of clients and can give this role proper focus

 • Can commit to a full-time schedule aligned with Eastern Time

 • Have excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)



THIS IS NOT FOR YOU IF:

 • You rush edits just to finish faster

 • You rely on templates or cookie-cutter editing

 • You are juggling too many clients and can’t stay fully engaged

 • You need constant supervision

 • You miss deadlines or make excuses

 • You cannot commit to a full-time schedule or Eastern Time hours

 • Your English communication is not strong and clear



IMPORTANT:

We are building a high-level brand. Everything must feel clean, intentional, engaging, and premium. No shortcuts. No mediocre work.



???? BONUS STRUCTURE (PER VIDEO PERFORMANCE):

This is your bonus structure so you’re rewarded even more, especially as we’re growing:



3K views = $5

5K views = $15

10K views = $30

25K views = $50

50K views = $100

100K views = $200

250K views = $350

500K views = $600

1M views = $1,500

2M+ views = $3,000



Bonuses are paid on the last day of each month.



???? CONSISTENCY BONUS:

If we hit multiple videos over 10K views in a row, I’ll add a $50 bonus after every 3 consecutive videos that pass 10K views.



???? TRIAL EDIT (REQUIRED TO QUALIFY):

To be considered for this position, you must complete a full long-form trial edit.

 • You will be given raw footage for a 20-minute YouTube video

 • Your task is to edit the video to the highest level of quality you are capable of



The edit must demonstrate:

 • Strong storytelling and flow

 • High-level retention editing (pacing, cuts, engagement)

 • Motion graphics where appropriate

 • Captions and on-screen text

 • Sound design (music, effects, timing)

 • Clean, professional, and intentional editing throughout



This trial is designed to evaluate your true skill level, attention to detail, and creative ability.



Only candidates who complete the trial at a high level will be considered.



COMPENSATION:

Base pay plus performance-based bonuses. Strong opportunity for long-term growth as the brand scales.



TO APPLY:

Send your best work (portfolio or links), examples of both long-form and short-form edits, and a short message explaining why you are a great fit for this role.



FINAL NOTE:

We’re not looking for just an editor. We’re looking for someone who wants to be part of a movement.

title: Business Manager
description:
About Us

We are a leading, accredited provider of essential health, safety, and professional training courses. We are committed to empowering businesses and individuals with the knowledge and certifications required to operate safely, compliantly, and efficiently. Our portfolio includes a wide range of courses, from First Aid and Fire Safety to IOSH, NEBOSH, and bespoke corporate training solutions. As we enter a significant growth phase, we are seeking a dynamic and driven Business Manager to lead our commercial efforts.



The Role

We are looking for a highly motivated and results-oriented Business Manager to take full ownership of our sales, marketing, and business development strategy. This is a pivotal role where you will be the engine for our growth, responsible for expanding our client base, strengthening our market presence, and driving reve-nue.

You will be a strategic leader with an in-depth understanding of our industry. Your expertise in UK and Northern Ireland health and safety legislation will be crucial in building credibility with clients and tailoring solutions that meet their specific compliance needs.



Key Responsibilities and Duties

1. Business Development & Sales:

• Develop and execute a robust strategic sales plan to achieve and exceed revenue targets.

• Proactively identify, qualify, and pursue new business opportunities across various sectors (construction, healthcare, corporate, education, etc.).

• Build and maintain a strong pipeline of potential clients through a combi-nation of cold calling, networking, and lead follow-up.

• Conduct compelling client presentations and proposals, effectively articu-lating the value and ROI of our training programmes.

• Negotiate and close contracts with clients of all sizes, from SMEs to large corporate accounts.

• Manage the entire sales cycle from initial contact to final agreement.

2. Marketing Strategy:

• Develop and implement a comprehensive marketing plan to enhance brand awareness and generate high-quality leads.

• Manage our digital marketing presence, including, social media (LinkedIn,
, etc.), and
 marketing campaigns.

• Oversee the creation of marketing collateral

• Analyse market trends and competitor activity to identify new opportuni-ties and refine our value proposition.

• Represent the company at industry events, trade shows, and networking forums.

3. Client Relationship and Industry Expertise:

• Act as a trusted advisor to clients, leveraging your deep knowledge of health and safety training to recommend the most suitable courses for their compliance requirements.

• Demonstrate expert knowledge of key UK and Northern Ireland health and safety legislation, including but not limited to the Health and Safety at Work etc. Act 1974, Management of Health and Safety at Work Regula-tions 1999, and their Northern Ireland equivalents.

• Possess a thorough understanding of the nuances between awarding bod-ies 

• Maintain and develop strong, long-term relationships with existing clients to ensure high levels of retention and identify opportunities for account growth.

4. Operational & Strategic Leadership:

• Provide regular sales forecasts and performance reports to the Leadership team.

• Collaborate with the training and operations team to ensure seamless course delivery and exceptional client service.

• Contribute to the strategic direction of the business, identifying new course offerings and market opportunities.



Essential Skills and Experience:

• Proven Track Record: A demonstrable and strong background in business development, sales, and marketing, with a history of meeting and exceeding targets. A mandatory minimum of 5 years' professional experience as a Business Manager within a UK-based company, with a strong preference for direct experience within a training centre environment. You must have an in-depth understanding of the operational and commercial dynamics of the UK training sector. Candidates without this specific, verifiable 5-year UK work history will not be considered.

• Industry Knowledge: In-depth, practical knowledge of a wide range of UK and Northern Ireland health and safety training courses 

• Legislative Expertise: Comprehensive knowledge of UK and Northern Ireland health and safety laws, regulations, and approved codes of practice. You must be able to confidently discuss compliance requirements with cli-ents.

• Excellent Communication: Outstanding verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to build rapport, influence decision-makers, and deliver engaging presentations.

• Full Commitment: Must have no other work commitments that could conflict with the demands of this role. 

• Character References: Ability to provide at least three professional, verifiable character references that attest to your integrity, work ethic, and sales performance.

title: Website Designer/Developer for a Simple Website for Estate Fencing Business
description:
Job Post: Website Designer/Developer for a Simple Website for Estate Fencing Business



Project Title: Professional Website for Estate Fencing Contractor with Portfolio Gallery



Project Description:

I am seeking a freelance web designer/developer to create a clean, professional website for my estate and agricultural fencing business. This is a straightforward project for a UK-based professional who needs an online presence primarily to showcase completed work and generate enquiries.

The website must be mobile-responsive, fast-loading, and easy for me to update with new project photos in future. I have all photographs ready to supply.



Website Structure & Pages Required:

1. Home Page

o Hero banner with strong imagery

o Brief introduction to services

o Clear call-to-action buttons ("View Our Work", "Get a Quote")

o Professional, trade-appropriate design

2. Gallery / Our Work (Priority Page)

o Organised portfolio of project photographs

o Categorisation (e.g., Estate Fencing, Agricultural, Post & Rail, Gates)

o Grid layout with click-to-enlarge functionality

o Simple captions for each image

3. Services

o List of fencing services offered

o Clear, concise descriptions

o Bullet-point format acceptable

4. About / Why Choose Us

o Short business introduction

o Key selling points (quality, reliability, fully insured, etc.)

o Professional photograph of the tradesperson/team

5. Contact Page

o Contact form (Name,
, Phone, Message)

o Direct contact details (telephone,
)

o Service area information

o Links to social media 



Essential Requirements:

• Mobile-first, responsive design (majority of enquiries will come from mobile)

• Fast loading times (optimised images and performance)

• Simple CMS (WordPress or similar) allowing me to add future photos

• SEO setup (Google Business Profile integration would be a plus)

• UK hosting recommendations/inclusion

• Domain connection guidance 



What I Will Provide:

• High-quality project photographs (organised by category)

• Business branding preferences (colours, style guidance)

• Prompt feedback and content approvals



Timeline: 2-3 weeks from project commencement



Ideal Candidate:

• Experience creating websites for tradespeople/small businesses

• Portfolio demonstrating clean, functional designs

• Strong understanding of mobile user experience

• Reliable communication and UK working hours overlap

• Ability to provide simple training/documentation for future updates



Please include in your proposal:

1. Examples of similar trade/business websites you've created

2. Your estimated timeline for this project

3. What's included in your quoted price

4. Whether you provide any post-launch support/training

5. Your availability to start



Applications without portfolio examples will not be considered.

title: Bookkeeper / Financial Operations Assistant
description:
Multi-Location Auto Repair Company (Car-Aid Auto Repair)

Location: Remote

Type: Long-term contractor

Industry: Automotive Service

Company Revenue: $6M+ annually

Growth: Multiple locations with additional expansion planned

Car-Aid Auto Repair is a fast-growing multi-location automotive repair company operating in Michigan with 5 locations and expanding to 6+ shops soon.

We are looking for a highly organized and analytical Remote Bookkeeper / Financial Operations Assistant who can help us maintain accurate financial records while also producing clear financial reports that help leadership make better business decisions.

This role is not just data entry bookkeeping.

We are looking for someone who understands financial performance, KPIs, and operational reporting.

What You’ll Be Responsible For

Bookkeeping & Financial Accuracy

Maintain clean and organized financial records.

Responsibilities include:

• Bank and credit card reconciliation

• Transaction categorization in QuickBooks

• Invoice and payment reconciliation

• Vendor bill entry and tracking

• Parts vendor reconciliation (NAPA, AutoZone, etc.)

• Sales tax tracking and preparation





Multi-Location Financial Reporting

Because we operate multiple repair shops, accurate location reporting is critical.

You will help maintain:

• Profit & Loss statements for each location

• Consolidated company financials

• Revenue tracking by shop

• Monthly shop performance comparisons

• Technician labor efficiency tracking

• Parts margin tracking by location

Current locations:

Southfield

Waterford

Troy

Shelby

Utica

Macomb (opening soon)

KPI & Business Performance Reporting

We run our business based on data and performance metrics.

You will help produce monthly reports including:

• Gross Profit %

• Labor Margin

• Parts Margin

• Average Repair Order (ARO)

• Revenue per Lift

• Technician Productivity

• Technician Efficiency

• Car Count

• Net Profit %

These reports should be presented as clear dashboards or simple charts.



Payroll Support

Assist with payroll reporting and calculations.

Tasks include:

• Payroll reconciliation (ADP)

• Advisor commission calculations

• Technician flat-rate pay calculations

• PTO tracking

• Payroll expense reports

Accounts Receivable & Payable

• Track outstanding invoices

• Send payment reminders

• Vendor payment scheduling

• Credit card expense tracking

Budgeting & Forecasting

Support financial planning and growth initiatives.

Responsibilities include:

• Monthly budget tracking

• Cash flow forecasting

• Expense monitoring

• Break-even analysis

• Financial projections for new locations

Financial Controls & Review

Help protect the financial health of the company by:

• Flagging unusual transactions

• Identifying duplicate payments

• Auditing expense categories

• Maintaining clean financial documentation



Year-End Support

• Prepare CPA-ready financial packages

• Assist with 1099 preparation

• Maintain tax-ready financials

• Track asset depreciation

Software Experience Required

Candidates should have experience with:

• QuickBooks Online

• ADP

• Excel / Google Sheets

• POS or business system integrations

• Inventory / parts accounting

Bonus if you have experience with:

• TechMetric or automotive shop management software

• Multi-location businesses

• Financial dashboard reporting

Monthly CEO Report

Each month you will provide leadership with a short financial summary including:

• Company P&L

• Cash position

• Location comparison

• Expense changes

• Profit trends

Ideal Candidate

We are looking for someone who:

• Has 3+ years bookkeeping or accounting experience

• Is extremely detail-oriented

• Understands financial reporting and KPIs

• Can organize financial data into clear reports

• Communicates clearly and proactively

• Can work independently

Experience with automotive repair businesses is a strong bonus but not required.

Compensation

Competitive pay based on experience.

Long-term opportunity with a growing company.

title: Executive Assistant (Remote – Philippines)
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a highly capable, proactive, and solution-oriented Executive Assistant to support the CEO and C-level leadership team.



This is not a passive admin role. You will act as an execution partner who helps reduce mental load, keeps things moving, and handles both business and personal administrative tasks with ownership and discretion. The right person is organized, calm under pressure, and comfortable handling a mix of executive work, research, outreach, follow-ups, and small life-admin tasks that make a real difference.



Key Responsibilities

Inbox & Calendar Management: Actively manage the CEO’s
 inbox by reading, filtering, prioritizing, and organizing messages. Draft responses and resolve requests directly when possible.



Executive & C-Level Support: Provide operational support to the leadership team. Ensure action items are executed and never forgotten.



Research, Outreach & Follow-Up: Conduct research on vendors and partnership opportunities. Identify key contacts and manage professional outreach and follow-up.



Personal & Life Administration: Handle critical personal tasks (booking appointments, coordinating services, managing deliveries) to reduce the CEO's mental load.



Organization & Problem-Solving: Identify issues before they become problems and resolve them proactively.



Reporting: Provide concise updates on completed tasks, pending items, and decisions needed.



What We’re Looking For

Strong written and verbal English communication skills.



Excellent organization, follow-up, and prioritization abilities.



Comfortable handling sensitive information with discretion.



Attention to Detail: To show us you’ve read this far, please include the word "Pineapple" in the subject line of your application.



Proactive mindset with strong ownership and accountability.



Calm, reliable, and solution-oriented approach.



Tools & Work Environment

Proficient in Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Docs, Sheets).



Able to learn new tools quickly and adapt to evolving workflows.



Fully remote role based in the Philippines.



Why This Role Is Different

This role is about making executives’ lives easier, not just managing schedules. You’ll be trusted to think ahead, solve problems quietly, and keep things running smoothly behind the scenes.



How to Apply

If you enjoy being the person who makes everything work without needing constant direction, we want to hear from you.



Please submit your resume along with a brief (1–2 minute) video introduction. We’d love to hear about a time you took initiative to solve a problem before your boss even knew it existed.

title: Klaviyo Expert & Email Marketing Strategist (E-commerce / Furniture)
description:
About Ornate Home

Ornate Home is a premier furniture retailer in the US. We combine a massive online presence with high-end physical showrooms, delivering nationwide. We don’t just sell furniture; we curate lifestyles. We are looking for an
 marketing veteran to take our Klaviyo account to the next level.



The Mission - Full Remote

We don’t need a "virtual assistant" who can schedule a campaign. We need a Klaviyo Master who understands the nuances of high-ticket e-commerce. You will be responsible for the entire lifecycle: from advanced segmentation and behavioral triggers to hyper-targeted weekly campaigns that drive revenue.



Key Responsibilities

Klaviyo Mastery: Total ownership of the dashboard. If there’s a feature in Klaviyo, you should know how to use it to drive ROI.



Flow Optimization: Build and refine complex flows (Abandoned Cart, Browse Abandonment, Post-Purchase Upsells, Win-backs) specifically tailored for long-sale-cycle items like furniture.



Advanced Segmentation: Segment our massive list based on purchase history, browsing behavior, and geographic location (near our showrooms).



Data-Driven Growth: Run A/B tests on subject lines, layouts, and send times. You should live in the "Analytics" tab.



Design & Copy Oversight: Ensure every
 reflects the premium Ornate Home brand.



Required Qualifications

Proven Track Record: At least 3+ years of experience managing Klaviyo for high-volume e-commerce brands. (Case studies or portfolio required).



The "Furniture Plus": Experience in the furniture or home decor niche is a massive advantage. You understand the "considered purchase" journey.



No Black Spots: You have 100% mastery of Klaviyo—API integrations, custom properties, and multi-step flows are second nature to you.



US Market Savvy: Excellent written English and an understanding of US consumer holidays and buying habits.



How to Apply

To ensure you have high attention to detail, please include the following in your application:



A link to your portfolio or 2–3 specific examples of Klaviyo results you’ve achieved.



Personalization Question: Given that Ornate Home sells large furniture items, what is one specific
 flow or segment you would implement to help a customer d
 on a high-ticket item (like a $3,000 sectional) versus a small accessory?

description:
Remote – Full Time  |  Ornate Home Furniture & Mattress





About the Role

Ornate Home is a fast-growing U.S. furniture and mattress retailer. We are looking for a Customer Support Representative who will handle delivery, shipping, tracking, and order-related questions from customers using our support platform, Gladly.



This is a long-term, full-time remote position for someone who is reliable, friendly, and detail-oriented. We have a strong track record of growing top performers into sales support, fulfillment coordination, and executive assistance roles — this is a real career path, not just a ticket queue.



Responsibilities

You will primarily handle:

• Replying to customer phone calls,
s, and chat messages inside Gladly

• Answering questions related to delivery timeframes, shipment tracking, and order status

• Providing basic product information (we provide templates)

• Checking updates in Shopify or our logistics systems

• Providing clear and friendly responses that reflect our brand voice

• Escalating cases you cannot solve to our in-house team (simple, documented procedure)

• Documenting details in each ticket before closing

• Supporting the team with occasional internal coordination tasks as you grow into the role



No cold calling. No complicated troubleshooting. This role is built around great customer communication — with room to expand for the right person.



We Will Train You On

• Using Gladly

• Shopify basics

• How to check tracking, carriers, and fulfillment info

• Which questions to escalate vs. which to answer independently

• Our support templates and tone guidelines



Prior furniture knowledge or e-commerce customer support experience is a plus, but not required.



Requirements

• Excellent written and spoken English

• Experience in customer support (any industry considered)

• Ability to work U.S. business hours — PST

• Comfortable managing multiple tools, tabs, and workflows simultaneously

Nice to Have

• Previous experience supporting U.S.-based customers or teams

• Experience assisting executives, handling scheduling, or coordinating tasks remotely

Key Performance Indicators

• Response time

• Accuracy of answers

• Following SOPs

• Proper escalation

• Ticket closure rate

• Customer satisfaction (CSAT)

• Proactive communication — flags issues before they escalate



We provide simple, clear workflows — you will never be left guessing what to do.



Schedule

• Full-time (40 hours/week)

• U.S. business hours (PST)



Benefits

• Stable, long-term position

• Competitive pay based on experience

• Friendly, supportive team

• Full training provided

• Clear path to growth — top performers have moved into sales support, fulfillment coordination, and executive assistance roles within the company



How to Apply

Please send the following:

We look forward to meeting you!

title: Appointment Setter (Warm Leads)
description:
Meet Capacity Coaching:



At Capacity Coaching, we help cyclists live like elite athletes: intentional, balanced, and driven, so sport becomes a path to a more fulfilling life. Most athletes burn out trying to constantly push harder. The best don’t just smash their limits; they master them. Our coaching helps them walk that line, training close enough to their edge to move it without tipping over it.



Our athletes are elite racers, students, and working professionals. We give them the tools and structure to keep progressing when life gets messy, so training stays sustainable and they can show up confident on the days that matter.



Endurance sport has given us far more than fitness: direction, structure, and real self-worth. We’ve lived this journey ourselves, and we built Capacity Coaching to share it. The proof is in our results:

- Helped 60+ athletes achieve 30+ podium race results

- Coached 3 cycling teams to multiple wins

- Currently coaching the 2 best university cycling teams in Los Angeles 



If you want to do fulfilling, impactful work that helps people, you’ll feel at home here.



Lead Nurture Vision:

We are building a small, high-standard lead nurture engine that reflects our athletic standards. That means we are looking for someone who wants to master the “boring but important” work: responding fast, following a process, and turning attention into appointments.



You will start by owning warm DMs and
 replies. If you perform at a high level over time, we will open up more responsibilities (operations, content support, more hours), with appropriate increases in pay.



You will not just be “a VA.” You will be the first layer between our audience and our coaching.



Who this is for:

- You enjoy chatting with people via DMs and
 and can stay professional and friendly.

 nurture.

) within 5 minutes during your shift.

- Consistent number of calls booked per week from DMs and
s (targets set together and tracked).

- High show rate on calls you booked by setting clear expectations and confirming details.

- Accurate tags and notes on all conversations you touch.



Requirements:

- 6 months or more experience as a VA, customer support rep, or DM/appointment setter is preferred, but not required if you can show similar work.

- Strong written English and excellent communication skills.

- Self-sufficient and able to manage your own time in a remote role.

- Open to learning new tools and processes (Manychat, Flodesk, Calendly, simple CRMs/spreadsheets).

- Able to work approximately 4 hours per day, 5 days per week, with some overlap to Pacific Time (USA). 

- Very high attention to detail and consistency.

- Reliable internet



Compensation:

- Base pay of $5-6 USD per hour, depending on experience and skills.

- Performance bonuses for booked calls that meet our qualification and show criteria.

- Pay increases over time as you take on more responsibility and consistently hit your targets.



Benefits:

- Long-term, stable role if you are a strong fit.

- Opportunity to grow into broader responsibilities (operations support, more hours, higher pay) based on performance.

- Direct work with the founder, with clear feedback and expectations so you can improve quickly.

- Chance to be part of a business that helps athletes get faster, more confident, and more fulfilled.

title: Accounts Payable Specialist
description:
About the Company/Role:



We are a dynamic and growing wholesale distribution company specializing in dropship fulfillment. Our mission is to deliver high-quality products and exceptional service to our customers, supported by strong operational and accounting processes.



We are seeking a detail-oriented Accounts Payable Clerk to support our accounting team with vendor invoice processing, document organization, and vendor account reconciliation. This role plays an important part in ensuring that invoices and vendor statements received via
 are accurately recorded, organized, and reconciled in a timely manner.



The ideal candidate is highly organized, comfortable working with accounting systems and spreadsheets, and able to manage a high volume of transactions while maintaining accuracy. This position requires someone who can follow established processes while also contributing to improvements in efficiency and workflow.



This is a hands-on role within a growing business in an established industry. The successful candidate will perform essential AP functions that directly support the company’s operations and vendor relationships. The role requires strong attention to detail, dependability, and a high level of accuracy, along with excellent written and verbal communication skills when working with both internal tea
mbers and external vendors.



Key Responsibilities:



Invoice Processing

• Enter vendor invoices into the ERP system in accordance with company procedures

• Process freight invoices received via
 and ensure they are properly recorded and matched to the appropriate transactions

• Review inventory invoices and voucher those that match purchase records within established tolerances for minor        rounding differences



Document Management

• Monitor the AP
 inbox for incoming invoices and statements

• Save vendor invoices to the appropriate folders following established filing procedures

• Maintain organized electronic records for invoices and vendor documents



Vendor Statements & Reconciliations

• Save vendor statements received by
 and organize them in the appropriate folders

• Perform preliminary vendor statement reconciliations to determine whether invoices are already on file

• Update internal reconciliation spreadsheets to document missing or outstanding invoices



Vendor Communication

• Request vendor statements via
 when directed by the accounting team

• Communicate with vendors regarding invoice copies when necessary



Team Support

• Assist the accounting team with document retrieval and vendor account research

• Work with the accounting team to identify opportunities for process improvements and more efficient workflows

• Support special accounting projects and other duties as assigned

• Participate in weekly video meetings with the accounting team to review priorities, discuss issues, and coordinate ongoing work

• Be available to communicate with vendors or customers by phone when necessary to help resolve payment or invoice questions

• Communicate clearly and professionally with tea
mbers through
, messaging, and video calls

• Collaborate with the accounting team to ensure tasks are completed accurately and on schedule



Qualifications

• 2–5 years of experience in Accounts Payable, bookkeeping, or accounting support

• Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

• Experience working with accounting software or ERP systems

• Comfortable working with Excel or spreadsheets

• Strong written English communication

• Ability to follow documented accounting procedures

• Strong organizational skills and experience managing large volumes of
ed invoices is highly valued in this role

Preferred Experience

• Experience supporting US-based accounting teams

• Experience working with distribution or product-based companies

• Experience with invoice matching or vendor statement reconciliations



Technology Requirements:



This is a remote contractor role. The selected candidate must provide their own work equipment and workspace, including:

• A reliable computer capable of running modern accounting and office software

• Stable high-speed internet connection

• A quiet and professional work environment suitable for remote work

Our company will provide access to the necessary software systems, but hardware such as computers, monitors, and other equipment will not be supplied.



Work Schedule:



This position requires working overnight hours in the Philippines in order to align with our U.S.-based accounting team.



Typical working hours in the Philippines will be:

• 8:30 PM – 5:30 AM (Philippines Time) when the U.S. is on Daylight Saving Time (March – November)

• 9:30 PM – 6:30 AM (Philippines Time) when the U.S. is on Standard Time (November – March)



These hours correspond to 8:30 AM – 5:30 PM Eastern Time (U.S.), which are our company’s normal business hours.

Candidates must be comfortable working overnight hours on a consistent basis.



Industry Disclosure:



Our company operates in the specialty retail and distribution industry, supplying products that are intended for adult consumers. As a result, some product names, product descriptions, or images encountered in our systems and documents may contain adult-oriented content.

Candidates should be comfortable working in a professional environment where such products are part of the business.



Application Instructions:



When applying, please include a short paragraph describing your experience processing vendor invoices or performing vendor statement reconciliations.



Please begin your application with the words “AP Specialist” so we know you reviewed the full job description.

title: WordPress + Elementor Developer (Growth Track)
description:
Type: Part-Time to Start (Path to Full-Time)

Location: Remote – Philippines only

Compensation: Based on experience



?



About Square 1 Group



We help service-based businesses scale through websites, systems, and automation.



That means:

 • High-converting websites

 • Clean backend workflows

 • Simple systems that actually drive revenue



We don’t just build pages. We build machines that generate clients.



If you like solving real problems and not just clicking buttons, you’ll fit here.



?



The Role



We’re hiring a WordPress + Elementor Developer who can take a Figma design and turn it into a clean, responsive, production-ready site.



This is a specialist-first role.



Your main focus is WordPress.



Over time, there is an opportunity to expand into other platforms (Wix, Squarespace, GHL), but only after you are fully confident in your core role.



We don’t throw random tasks at you. We build skills intentionally.



?



What We’re Looking For



You’re not just a task-doer.



You take ownership of builds and care about how things actually look and function.



You don’t guess. You think.



?



Must-Have Skills

 • Strong experience with WordPress + Elementor

 • Ability to translate Figma designs into pixel-clean layouts

 • Solid understanding of mobile and tablet responsiveness

 • Experience working with Custom Post Types (CPTs)

 • Can troubleshoot:

 • layout issues

 • plugin conflicts

 • responsive bugs

 • Strong attention to spacing, alignment, and visual consistency



?



Bonus Skills (Not Required)

 • Basic PHP knowledge (shortcodes, template tweaks)

 • Familiarity with Wix, Squarespace, or GoHighLevel

 • Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) or CRM-based page builders

 • Understanding of site speed and basic SEO structure

 • Comfortable with Slack, Zapier, Google Drive, Loom



?



Responsibilities

 • Build full pages in Elementor based on Figma designs

 • Ensure clean, responsive layouts across all devices

 • Implement dynamic content using CPTs when needed

 • QA your own work before submitting (no sloppy handoffs)

 • Fix layout, spacing, and styling issues proactively

 • Follow build timelines and communicate blockers early



As you grow in the role, you may:

 • Support builds on other platforms (Wix, Squarespace, GHL)

 • Help improve internal build systems and workflows



?



How to Apply



Record a Loom video (3–5 minutes):

 • Introduce yourself

 • Walk us through a WordPress + Elementor site you built

 • Show the backend

 • Explain how you handled:

 • layout

 • responsiveness

 • dynamic content (if applicable)



Send to: 



Subject line:

[Your Name] – WP Developer Application – Mango



Include:

 • Loom video link

 • Resume

 • Links/screenshots of past work



?



This Role Is NOT For You If

 • You’ve never worked with Elementor

 • You need constant supervision or reminders

 • You submit work without checking it first

 • You disappear, miss deadlines, or make excuses



?



This Role IS For You If

 • You take pride in clean, high-quality builds

 • You like solving problems, not just following steps

 • You want to grow your skillset over time (not all at once)

 • You move fast, communicate clearly, and take ownership

 • You want to be part of a team that actually builds real systems



?



Final Note



We value people who are:

 • Reliable

 • Proactive

 • Detail-oriented



You don’t need to know everything.



But you do need to figure things out.

title: Senior Helpdesk Engineer
description:
HOW TO APPLY:

/bepartofourteam.





We’re looking for a hands-on senior IT professional who can support clients at all levels while also leading or assisting with IT projects and driving innovative solutions.

Our senior tea
mbers are critical to supporting our awesome clients and their users. They leverage industry-leading tools and expertise to resolve complex issues, prevent future problems, and improve client IT environments.

This role is perfect for someone who enjoys solving challenging technical problems while also designing and implementing improvements that make a real impact.



Key Responsibilities:



Client Support (All Levels)



Provide technical support to clients via phone,
, and remote access—handling everything from basic troubleshooting to advanced escalations.

Diagnose and resolve hardware, software, and network issues for multiple clients.

Perform O365 and Windows administration, user account management, and access provisioning.

Support and troubleshoot VOIP systems (e.g., 3CX).

Manage and maintain RMM and PSA tools (e.g., Datto, Halo).

Mentor junior engineers and provide guidance to improve team troubleshooting skills.





Projects & Innovation



Lead or assist with IT projects, e.g cloud migrations, system upgrades, deployments, and process automation etc.

Identify and implement solutions to reduce recurring issues and improve efficiency.

Collaborate with vendors and clients to plan, test, and deliver new IT solutions.



Documentation & Communication

Requirements

Excellent communication skills – able to have comfortable, friendly conversations in English without being overly formal or technical.

Ability to “figure things out,” even when facing new or unfamiliar technologies.

title: Operations Manager
description:
Join the Aventus Team!



We are Aventus — a boutique customer experience BPO in Charleston, South Carolina, with over 10 years of providing omnichannel support to 100+ amazing clients and partners in the e-commerce industry.



Check out our website: 



We’re looking for a dynamic and results-driven Operations Manager to ensure the success of assigned campaigns by overseeing daily operations, driving performance, and building strong client relationships. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, balances people development with operational rigor, and brings a strategic lens to campaign management.



What You’ll Be Doing:

As an Operations Manager, you’ll oversee client campaigns, coach and develop team leaders, monitor performance, and collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure KPIs and SLAs are consistently achieved. You’ll also play a key role in identifying opportunities for growth, innovation, and operational excellence.



Your Core Responsibilities:

**Coach Development

- Equip coaches to meet client SLAs and KPIs

- Provide mentorship and actionable feedback to enhance agent performance

- Foster continuous learning and personalized growth plans for coaches

**Performance Management & KPIs

- Ensure SLA and KPI goals are consistently met or exceeded

- Monitor and drive performance through daily, weekly, and monthly reporting

**Client Relationship Management

- Identify growth opportunities within client accounts, including volume and channel expansion

- Collaborate with the Client Success team to support expansion proposals

- Maintain strong, trusted client relationships to exceed expectations

**Process Improvement & Innovation

- Identify and implement process improvements based on data and best practices

- Enhance service quality and efficiency through continuous improvement initiatives

**Operational Compliance & Risk Management

- Ensure compliance with client protocols, industry regulations, internal policies, and PCI requirements

**Technology & Tools Optimization

- Partner with IT and Product teams to optimize CRM, ticketing, QA, and e-commerce platforms (e.g., Shopify, Gorgias)

**Cross-Functional Leadership

- Lead initiatives with QA, Training, Workforce, and HR to support business continuity, certification, and scaling



What You’ll Bring to the Table

- 3–5+ years’ experience in operations management, preferably in BPO, customer experience, or e-commerce support

- Proven success in meeting and exceeding SLAs, KPIs, and client expectations

- Strong leadership skills with experience in coaching and developing managers/coaches

- Excellent client-facing communication and relationship management skills

- Data-driven mindset with the ability to translate insights into strategy and action

- Familiarity with CRM, CX, and e-commerce platforms (e.g., Gorgias, Shopify)



Core Competencies

- Customer Centricity: Advocates for the customer while balancing efficiency

- Strategic Thinking: Aligns team goals with broader business objectives

- Results Orientation: Focused on achieving measurable outcomes (CSAT, AHT, FCR, conversion rates)

- Team Empowerment: Builds a coaching culture of accountability, feedback, and growth



What’s In It For You?

- 100% Remote Work – Work from anywhere in the Philippines

- Career Development – Grow your leadership and operational expertise in a scaling organization

- Competitive Compensation – $11/hr + bonuses + benefits as an independent contractor

- Inclusive Culture – Join a team that values transparency, balance, and kindness

- Purposeful Work – Lead meaningful initiatives that impact clients and their customers every day



Ready to Drive Operational Success?

If you’re a strategic leader who thrives on building teams, exceeding client expectations, and driving operational excellence, we’d love to meet you!

We are currently using tools like Pipedrive, but we want someone who is confident working across multiple platforms and not tied to one system.

title: Sales (accounting and VA services) professional with CEO potential?
description:
Hours: Flexible (20, 40, or 40+ hours per week)



ABOUT THE OPPORTUNITY

Our organization provides administrative and bookkeeping support to USA businesses, focused on Property management and the allied trades. Our clients don't just need "help"—they need clarity, reliability, and the ability to scale without overhead. We are looking for a strategic Marketing Manager /' Growth expert / potential COO  who can connect our offshore expertise with business owners who need to reclaim their time.



ABOUT THE ROLE

You will be the engine behind our client acquisition. Your mission is to communicate the value of offshore delegation to skeptical or overwhelmed business owners. This isn't about "posting on socials"; it's about building a lead-generation machine and signing up the business, or creating appointments for the onshore team to sign up the clients. The goal is to sign up the first role within 6 weeks of starting, and the target is 50 FTE from the Philippines within 12 months.



That means:



Driving Lead Gen: Identifying and reaching business owners who need 20–40+ hours of weekly support, admin or books, or both. To help you, our USA reference site has 9 offshores from 3 continents, grown from zero 18 months ago. Our owner still work there as the Controller.



Sales Alignment: Ensuring the marketing funnel delivers "ready-to-buy" prospects for you to close. We will help.



Content Strategy: Creating case studies and messaging that highlight the pain points and demonstrating the ROI of offshore bookkeeping and admin.



Market Positioning: Differentiating our high-touch service from low-quality "gig" platforms.



WHAT YOU’LL OWN

Develop and execute
, SMS, and digital marketing campaigns targeting SMEs (the trades) and property management firms.    There is NOTHING there, it's a full new setup.



Develop and execute outreach via LinkedIn, SMS,
 marketing, and targeted advertising , creating compelling messaging that addresses the specific "pain points" of bookkeeping and admin, ongoing and perhaps backlog.



Rewrite the website will be an early task.



Create then optimize the conversion funnel from initial awareness to signed contract.



Report on key metrics (CPA, conversion rates, and lead quality) to leadership.



setup the backoffice in full, select and implement systems, diallers, software, etc.



YOU’RE A STRONG FIT IF YOU HAVE

Proven Experience: A track record in B2B marketing, specifically for professional services or outsourcing.



Strategic Mindset: You understand how to sell "time" and "peace of mind," not just tasks.



Adaptability: You are comfortable working with online teams and understand the global talent landscape. Obviously, you must be prepared to work graveyard shifts.



Results-Orientation: You prefer being measured by lead quality and revenue rather than just "likes" or "shares.". You have done this before, and are looking for a cultural fit that will lead to early equity stake.



Communication Skills: Exceptional English and a knack for building trust quickly.



WHY THIS ROLE MATTERS

Many business owners are drowning in paperwork and "invisible" admin tasks. By successfully marketing our services, you aren't just selling a product—you are providing the oxygen these businesses need to grow. You will be the bridge between world-class offshore talent and the clients who need them most.



include a CV and a video introduction

title: Commercial Real Estate Appraisal Analyst
description:
**IMPORTANT**

To apply for this role, only use this link:





Direct messages via onlinejobs.ph are not accepted.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Location: Remote (US hours)    



Type: Full-Time



Hours: 4:00 AM – 1:00 PM CST, Monday to Friday



Salary: PHP 80,000 – PHP 110,000 (PHP 100,000 – PHP 140,000 for MAI candidacy or proven US CRE track record)



 



About Pahroo



Pahroo Appraisal and Consultancy delivers commercial real estate valuations and advisory services across US markets, with a focus on assets underlying debt and equity investments. We work across office, industrial, multifamily, self-storage, and retail. The team is small, the work is rigorous, and the standards are high.



Working Hours — Please Read Before Applying

This role operates on US Central Standard Time: 4:00 AM – 1:00 PM CST, Monday to Friday. If you are based outside the US, please confirm this works for your circumstances before applying. It is a firm requirement.



The Role



You will sit within the valuation team, producing and supporting appraisal reports across a mixed commercial portfolio. The work is analytical, deadline-driven, and detail-critical. Once onboarded, you will be expected to work with a real degree of independence, drawing on sound US market knowledge to produce defensible value conclusions.



This is not an entry-level position. We need someone who understands why a number is what it is, not just how to arrive at it.



What You Will Do



 - Conduct research using industry databases — CoStar, REIS, RCA, PwC Real Estate Investor Survey, and broker market reports — to gather and interrogate comparable market evidence

 - Analyse property-level financial data including income statements, rent rolls, reimbursement schedules, and occupancy statistics to develop well-supported value indicators

 - Prepare collateral monitoring reports for assets underlying debt and equity investments across office, industrial, multifamily, self-storage, retail, and other property types

 - Produce USPAP-compliant appraisal reports ready for lender, investor, or regulatory review

 - Identify data gaps and market anomalies; flag assumptions that materially affect value conclusions

 - Manage competing report deadlines accurately without compromising on quality

 



What We Need



Required



 - Minimum 5 years of commercial real estate appraisal or valuation experience

 - Demonstrated, hands-on experience in the US property market — no learning curve on market fundamentals

 - Proficiency in ANOW, Total, and Excel-based valuation modelling

 - Working knowledge of USPAP requirements and their practical application in report preparation

 - Bachelor’s degree in Real Estate, Finance, Economics, or a closely related field

 - Strong written English — reports require clear, accurate, and defensible reasoning

 



Advantageous



 - MAI designation (Appraisal Institute) or active candidacy

 - RICS membership — relevant for internationally-based candidates with demonstrable US market exposure

 - Familiarity with CoStar, REIS, or RCA analytics platforms

 - Experience across two or more distinct asset classes

 



What We Offer



 - Base salary PHP 80,000 – PHP 110,000 per month

 - PHP 100,000 – PHP 140,000 for candidates with MAI candidacy or a demonstrable US CRE track record across multiple asset classes — we pay up for the right experience

 - Fully remote position

 - Clear onboarding with defined expectations from day one



**IMPORTANT**

To apply for this role, only use this link: 





Direct messages via onlinejobs.ph are not accepted.

title: Experienced Appointment Setters
description:
Company: HR Services Company (Brooklyn, NY – USA)

Employment Type: Full-Time / Part-Time

Work Hours: Aligned with U.S. Eastern Time (EST)



TO APPLY:



1. READ THE JOB DESCRIPTION

2. APPLY TO 
 WITH FOLLOWING DETAILS:

A. YOUR RESUME

B. YOUR PAY EXPECTATIONS

C. TOTAL NUMBER OF SALES EXPERIENCE FOR US COMPANIES. ( Minimum 2 years required)

C. TOTAL NUMBERS OF B TO B SALES EXPERIENCE. ( Minimum 2 Years required)

D. WHAT PRODUCTS / SERVICES YOU WERE SELLING

E. WOULD YOU BE ACTIVELY INVOLVED IN ANY OTHER PART TIME / DAY TIME JOB IF YOU WERE SELECTED FOR THIS JOB?











Role Overview



We are seeking a Remote Appointment Setter & Market Researcher to support our sales and recruiting teams. This role is ideal for a highly organized professional with excellent spoken and written English, strong research skills, and the ability to engage U.S.-based business clients professionally.



You will be responsible for researching target companies, identifying decision-makers, and setting qualified appointments for our U.S. sales team.



Key Responsibilities



Appointment Setting

s to U.S.-based businesses

Schedule qualified meetings for sales and recruiting managers

Support reporting and pipeline tracking



Qualifications



Based in the Philippines with reliable internet and quiet work environment



Strong English communication skills (spoken and written)

Comfortable speaking with U.S.-based clients over phone and video

What We Offer



Competitive pay based on experience



Remote work with a U.S.-based company



Training and ongoing support



Opportunity for long-term growth and performance-based incentives

title: Customer Support for E-commerce Brand (Long-term)
description:
Customer Support Assistant (E-commerce)



We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Customer Support Assistant to manage daily customer inquiries for our growing e-commerce brand.



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who values structure, speed, and clear communication.



About the Role

You will handle incoming customer messages using Gorgias. We work with a detailed SOP and ready-made templates that explain exactly how to respond to each situation.



It is extremely important that you carefully follow our SOP and use the provided templates. Attention to detail and consistency are crucial in this role.



If you are ever unsure how to reply, you may reach out to us directly or use tools like ChatGPT to help formulate a response, but always within the framework of our SOP.



You do not need to be a native English speaker, but you must be comfortable writing clear, correct, and professional English.



Working Hours

Log in 2 times per day (Europe/Amsterdam time, CET/CEST)

Clear the inbox during each login

Currently 5+ hours per day in total

We are growing fast, more hours may become available

If you prefer fewer hours, we will expand the team as needed.



Speed and accuracy are extremely important in our business. The goal is to keep the inbox fully cleared and respond to customers as quickly as possible.



Your Responsibilities

Respond to customer messages via Gorgias using ready-made templates

Follow our SOP carefully and consistently

Handle common requests such as returns, exchanges, address changes, and shipping updates

Escalate refunds or special cases to the Head of Customer Service or Founder (you do not process refunds yourself)

Keep the inbox fully cleared during your shifts

Take ownership of your tickets and ensure nothing is left unresolved

Identify recurring issues and suggest improvements

Communicate with kindness, patience, and professionalism at all times



Requirements

Experience in e-commerce or customer support

Familiarity with Shopify and Gorgias is a strong plus

Strong written English skills

Able to follow structured processes precisely

Comfortable using tools like ChatGPT when needed

Strong sense of responsibility and ownership

Proactive mindset, not just following but also thinking

Reliable internet connection

Detail-oriented, dependable, and responsive



Compensation

$5 per hour

Paid weekly via Wise

Long-term role with potential for growth



How to Apply

To confirm you have carefully read and understood this job description, please include the following in your application:

A short summary of your experience in e-commerce or customer support

Which tools you are familiar with (Shopify, Gorgias, etc.)

Your daily availability in Europe/Amsterdam time

In one sentence, explain why speed is important in customer support for a dropshipping business

In one sentence, explain what you would do if you notice another tea
mber making repeated mistakes



End your message with the sentence:

“Speed and structure are important to me.”



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.

title: AI Prompt Engineer
description:
We are looking for a skilled Claude AI Business and Financial Analyst. The role involves working closely with management to evaluate business processes and identify opportunities for AI-driven solutions. The candidate should have a strong background in business analysis to assess workflows, data usage, and AI technology integration.



The position requires agentic coding using AI coding agents (Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, OpenCode, Grok etc.) to build software to facilitate our real estate development and apartment rental business. The position requires that you are an expert coder and AI practitioner who has created real applications, not just experimented with AI tools. Demonstrative experience required. 



The candidate should have solid engineering fundamentals and the ability to critically review and improve on AI-generated plans by applying new AI tools creatively to improve our operations, finance, and reporting goals. 



Responsibilities/Requirements:

• Deep experience using Claude as a tool for research and organizational knowledge-gathering. 

• Design, test, and refine prompts for AI models to optimize output quality and relevance.

• Conduct research and experimentation to improve prompt engineering techniques.

• Analyze AI model behavior and performance, providing insights to improve accuracy and effectiveness.

• Stay updated on advancements in AI language models and share knowledge with the business team. 

• Conduct A/B testing on prompt variations to maximize output quality and efficiency.

• Assist in training AI models by curating datasets and refining inputs.

• Create AI enabled workflows to automate repeatable analysis, reduce manual effort, and enhance decision making .

• Develop modular prompt frameworks, reusable templates to scale AI across teams.

• Assess emerging AI tools and platforms; translate capabilities into practical business applications.

• Perform exploratory, operational, and ad hoc analyses using SQL, Excel, Power BI, and Python to support our workflow.

• Lead automation efforts for reporting, data preparation, and lead generation.

• Document end to end AI enabled workflows and create a central repository of processes and enhancements.

• Other duties as assigned



Key Requirements

• Bachelor's or higher degree in Computer Science, Linguistics, AI, or a related field.

• 3–5 years of experience in analytics, business analysis, or a related quantitative field, preferably in multifamily, real estate.

• Strong understanding of AI language models (e.g., GPT, Llama, Claude) and natural language processing (NLP).

• Experience in crafting and fine-tuning prompts for AI models.

• Proficiency in Python and familiarity with AI/ML frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch).

• Strong proficiency in SQL and Excel; experience with Python and building dashboards in Power BI is preferred.

• Experience using AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, Grok) in a professional or analytical context, not just experimental.

• Demonstrated curiosity about emerging AI technologies and a drive to optimize processes.

• Analytical mindset with the ability to translate technical concepts and capabilities into practical business applications.

• Strong communication skills with the ability to support non technical management.

• High level of ownership, with the ability to independently test, refine, and implement new ideas.

• Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to work in a fast-paced environment.

• Strong communication skills and a collaborative mindset.

title: AI Video Creative Designer
description:
AI Video Creative Designer



We’re looking for someone who enjoys creating AI videos and has a strong eye for quality.



You don’t need years of experience. What matters is taste.

If you can tell when AI looks fake and you’re willing to regenerate until it looks real, this role will fit you.



You’ll work inside our creative team and help produce short-form ad videos used for ecommerce brands.



---



What you’ll do



Create 10 AI video ads per day

(UGC style, product videos, lifestyle clips, hooks, storytelling)



Use Gemini, Higgsfield, Kling and video-to-image workflows



Turn videos into multiple variations and frames for testing



Improve outputs until they feel real and natural



Brainstorm hooks and creative angles with the team



Follow simple brand guidelines



---



Quality matters more than speed



We have high standards.



You don’t need experience, but you do need taste.



You should:



* Notice instantly when AI looks fake

* Care about realism and details

* Be okay with regenerating multiple times

* Not be satisfied with average output



If you just generate once and move on, this role isn’t for you.



---



Salary

$800/month



Remote role with a structured workflow and clear feedback.



---



What you’ll learn



You’ll learn how performance ads actually work:



* What makes people stop scrolling

* How ad hooks are built

* How creatives get tested and scaled

* Basic ad metrics and feedback loops

* How ecommerce brands use AI creatives at scale



This role can grow into marketing and creative direction if you perform well.



---



Who this is for



Someone creative with good taste

Someone consistent and reliable

Someone open to feedback

Someone curious about ads and marketing

Someone who wants long-term growth



---



Nice to have (not required)



Experience with AI video tools

Meta ad experience

UGC / short-form video knowledge

Ecommerce creative experience



---



Why join



Fully remote

Clear expectations

Fast feedback

Work inside a creative team (not alone)

Real growth opportunity

title: HVAC Purchasing, Warehouse & Vendor Coordination (Full-Time, EST)
description:
IMPORTANT: Warehouse & Purchasing Experience REQUIRED 

This is an entry-level role; however, prior warehouse, inventory, or purchasing experience is mandatory. 

HVAC experience (at least 1 year) is a STRONG PLUS 

Willingness to provide character references and/or previous client contacts is a PLUS 

Compensation & Schedule 



Salary Range: $5-6 an hour

Schedule: Full-Time — 8:00 AM to 4:00 PM Eastern Standard Time (EST) 

Remote / Virtual Position 

 

About the Role 

We are seeking a highly organized, detail-driven Virtual Assistant to support purchasing, inventory control, warehouse coordination, and vendor communications for a fast-paced U.S.-based HVAC company. 

This role directly supports ownership, shop management, dispatch, and field technicians to ensure parts, equipment, and materials are available for jobs without delays. 

If you excel in structured environments, communicate clearly in English, and can manage vendors, inventory, and purchase orders efficiently, this role may be an excellent fit. 

 

Core Responsibilities 

Purchasing & Inventory Control 

    •    Create, process, and track purchase orders for HVAC equipment, parts, and materials 

    •    Maintain accurate inventory records and investigate discrepancies 

    •    Monitor stock levels to support job readiness 

    •    Track usage and reorder points to prevent shortages 



Vendor & Warehouse Coordination 

    •    Communicate daily with vendors, suppliers, and warehouse contacts 

    •    Confirm pricing, availability, and delivery timelines 

    •    Resolve order issues, shortages, backorders, or delivery discrepancies 

    •    Monitor incoming and outgoing in-shop repairs 

Administrative & Data Management 



Maintain organized records of: 

    •    Purchase orders 

    •    Vendor quotes and invoices 

    •    Delivery confirmations 

    •    Inventory usage and job costing 

Additional tasks include: 

    •    High-volume, error-free data entry 

    •    Maintaining Excel trackers for real-time updates 

    •    Submitting End-of-Day reports consistently 



Internal Communication 

Serve as a coordination bridge between: 

    •    Owner / Shop Manager 

    •    Field Technicians 

    •    Vendors and Suppliers 

    •    Dispatch Team 



Provide clear updates on order status and inventory availability. 

REQUIRED Qualifications (Non-Negotiable) 



**Applicants who do not meet ALL requirements below will not be considered 

    •    College Graduate 

    •    Warehouse or Inventory Experience (REQUIRED) 

    •    Purchasing and Vendor Coordination Experience (REQUIRED) 

    •    Strong English Communication Skills (spoken and written) 

    •    Comfortable working with U.S.-based teams via phone and
 

    •    Full-time availability during EST business hours 

    •    Stable internet connection and reliable workstation 



Preferred / Advantage Qualifications 

- At least 1 year of HVAC industry experience (STRONG PLUS) 

- Experience handling HVAC parts, equipment, or service operations 

- Familiarity with U.S. vendors and procurement processes 

- Willingness to provide character references and/or previous client contacts 

- Experience with Jobber, 
, or similar platforms is a plus

 

Ideal Candidate Traits 

    •    Extremely detail-oriented and highly organized 

    •    Results-driven with strong accountability 

    •    Able to manage multiple priorities independently 

    •    Calm under pressure in a fast-paced environment 

    •    Professional phone presence 

    •    Strong problem-solving skills 



Please answer the following when applying: 

    1.    How many years of experience do you have in warehouse, inventory, or purchasing roles? 

    2.    Do you have experience working in the HVAC industry? If yes, please describe your responsibilities. 

    3.    What types of purchase orders or procurement tasks have you handled? 

    4.    Describe the inventory systems or tools you have used. 

    5.    Have you communicated directly with U.S.-based vendors or suppliers? Please explain. 

    6.    Are you available to work full-time from 8:00 AM to 4:00 PM EST? 

    7.    What is your experience with Microsoft 365, Excel or Google Sheets for tracking data? 

    8.    Describe a time you resolved a supply or delivery issue. 

    9.    Can you provide character references or previous client contacts? (At least 3 – Name, Phone # and
 Address) 

    10.    Why are you a strong fit for this role? 

Application Process (READ CAREFULLY) 



To be considered: 

    1.    Submit your resume and a concise summary clearly detailing: 

    1.    Warehouse / inventory experience 

    2.    Purchasing experience 

    3.    HVAC experience (if applicable) 

    2.    Available within the day after being considered to go to the next process to take the exam. 



NO EXAM = NO INTERVIEW 

Incomplete applications will be automatically rejected.

description:

mbers to keep workflows organized and on track

–

/itsandrewhorn



and 
 instagram and linkedin accounts.

title: Video Editor — Remote (Philippines)
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We are a LinkedIn content agency that produces social video content for executives and recruiters. We are hiring a video editor whose sole focus is turning long-form talking-head interview recordings into short, polished clips for LinkedIn. This is a straightforward, repeatable workflow. We are not looking for motion graphics artists, animators, or cinematic editors. We need someone who is fast, reliable, and precise at the specific process described below.



THE WORKFLOW (READ THIS CAREFULLY)

You will receive a single video file of a talking-head interview, typically 30 to 60 minutes long. Your job, start to finish:



1- Watch the full video and identify the 5 strongest 
nts that would make compelling standalone social media clips for LinkedIn. These should be self-contained insights, stories, opinions, or advice — the kind of content that makes someone stop scrolling.



2 - Cut 5 clips, each between 30 seconds and 2 minutes long. Each clip should open strong and end clean with no rambling lead-ins or awkward cutoffs.



3 - Enhance the audio. Clean up background noise, normalize levels, and make the speaker sound clear and professional.



4 - Color correct the footage. Adjust exposure, white balance, and color so the speaker looks polished and natural. Nothing cinematic or stylized — just clean and professional.



5 - Add subtitles. Burn accurate, well-timed subtitles into each clip. Spelling, grammar, and timing must be precise.



6 - Export and deliver the 5 finished clips in a format optimized for LinkedIn (MP4, vertical or square as specified per client).



That is the entire job. We do not need transitions, graphics, background music, intros, outros, lower thirds, or any other additions. Do not add them.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

- Experience editing talking-head or interview-style video

- Strong editorial judgment — you can watch a long conversation and identify the 
nts that matter

- Proficiency in audio cleanup and color correction 

- Accurate, well-timed subtitle creation

- Reliable turnaround and clear communication



WHAT WE'RE NOT LOOKING FOR

- Motion graphics or animation skills (we won't use them)

- Cinematic color grading or heavy visual effects

- Someone who wants to "add their creative touch" with transitions, music, or graphics — the deliverable is the speaker's words, cleaned up and clipped



Click the link below to complete our application form.
