We're hiring Customer Support Agents to join our 24/7 support team. This is a long-term, full-time contract with room to grow into senior and lead roles as the team expands.



What You'll Be Doing



Responding to customer inquiries via live chat,
, and WhatsApp through our support platform (Intercom)

Handling order status updates, document delivery questions, shipping inquiries, and general product questions

Tagging, categorizing, and logging every ticket correctly — accuracy matters here

Escalating complex or sensitive cases to senior team members with full context

Following our SOPs and response templates (we give you everything you need — no guessing)

Completing shift handoff logs so the next team member picks up exactly where you left off





What We're Looking For

Must-haves:



Fluent written English — clear, warm, professional tone

Experience in customer support 
 and/or live chat)

Fast typist — live chat requires quick, accurate responses

Reliable internet connection and a quiet work environment

Comfortable working a fixed shift schedule (we operate 24/7 across three shifts)

Detail-oriented — you notice things others miss



Nice to have:



Experience with Intercom, Zendesk, Freshdesk, or similar support tools

Experience in e-commerce, travel, or subscription-based businesses

Experience handling billing or payment-related inquiries



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application — applications without these will not be reviewed:



Your resume or CV (PDF preferred) — include your work history, tools you've used, and any relevant certifications

A short paragraph about your customer support experience (channels, tools, industries)



We read every application. We respond to shortlisted candidates within 3 business days.

title: Video Editor & Manager
description:
We are an established Health & Beauty brand and Media Agency. We have a high-performing team of 10, and we are looking for 2 hungry individuals to join us as an video editor + a social media manager



This is not a freelance gig. We want a long-term tea
mber who wants a stable home, world-class training, and massive performance upside.



The Role

We will train you to be a Marketing & Editing Machine. You will handle two main areas:



1. Create High-Level Ads: Creating high-converting Meta ads (we provide the training/tools).



2. Page Growth: Managing social pages to hit viral milestones. (Your consistent income comes from here, very easy)



Why Join Us?

Stable Pay: Base Retainer + Per-Video Pay.



Massive Bonuses: We pay cash bonuses for BOTH winning ads that you create and hitting view milestones (1M+ views) from the social media page



Top-Tier Tools: We provide access to the best AI creative tools (11Labs, Veo3, etc.).



Growth: We teach you and train you up so we can be hands off



Who You Are

Hyper-Responsive: You reply fast and give daily updates. No "ghosting."



Fast Learner: You are a "black hole" for instructions—you hear it once, and you execute.



English Pro: You speak and write English clearly.



The Vibe: You are likely a hungry Uni student or recent Grad looking to out-earn your peers through hard work. show your personality when applying! we wont bite!



How to Apply (No AI - We want to see your real personality if we notice that your message sounds ai, we will disqualify you)

Start your message with the word "Lemon" and include:



 &
:



Portfolio Link: (Show us your best E-com, Beauty, or Short-form work).



The Drive Check: Why are you the person we need? Be real with us.



Secret Word: Hide the word "Passionfruit" somewhere in your message.



Note: If your portfolio is solid, we skip the test samples and jump straight to a
 call.

title: customer service dropshipping
description:
Dear applicant,



We run a dropshipping business with multiple stores in different countries.



We are looking for long-term employees to join our team. There is a great deal of growth opportunity for those that consistently make a positive contribution to our company. We are seeking great candidates that will represent the company with great customer service and dedication.



Therefore, please apply the word strawberry before you introduce yourself. Read on to find out what tasks we expect you to perform, as well as the experience we feel is necessary for this job.



This is a Customer Support job where you would have to follow a very clear process to keep our customers happy, but which will become very simple when you understand every step.



MUST HAVE KNOWLEDGE OF THESE PLATFORMS:



Re-Amaze / G Suite (help desk CRM)

Shopify (eCommerce platform)

Slack (communication channel)

ChatGPT (for prompts + translations)

DeepL (for translation)

PayPal (for managing disputes)



Responsibilities:



Handling customer complaints.

Reporting on refunds/complaints.

Responding to customer
s regarding refunds, tracking numbers, FAQs.

Contributing to our documentation and improving our support processes.

Respond to all customer inquiries in a timely, polite and accurate manner.

Skilled in reporting into google sheets.

Skilled in generating weekly reports per store.

Demonstrate a high level of professionalism at all times.



We maintain an ETA of 24 hours so you must reply to the
s within this timeframe.



We will provide you with:



Video training

SOP’s to follow

 templates

Worksheets

Access to the team lead to answer all your questions.





Applicant needs to:



Speak fluent English both written and verbally

Minimum 2 years of experience in Ecommerce Customer Support

Be available for and open to team calls 

Must be organized, motivated, and willing to learn and grow.

Available to join immediately



Be available for a minimum of 40 hours per week once you are asked to start working full-time, we will start with a two week trial and then turn from part-time to full-time.

This means that in the ideal situation you are currently not working for other full-time jobs



Ideally, you'll have some experience with customer support, but ultimately we want to work with someone who loves helping people and is interested in handling customer support issues. We don't want any inconsistency in the
s exchanged with the customer. 



Examples: 

sent out the same
 twice 

in precise answers

off-topic answers



Please respond by telling me what similar experience you have had before and tell me why you think you are a good fit for this job!



I look forward to your proposal.



Thank you,



Mats

title: AI Tool Researcher (Cebu City, Philippines applicants only)
description:
Company: BriarBear

Location: Fully Remote (Philippines)

Schedule: Graveyard Shift (Start time between 6:00 PM - 8:00 PM PH Time)

Employment Type: Full-Time



About this Role



We are hiring an AI Tool Researcher to help our company stay at the forefront of the rapidly

evolving AI landscape. This role is equal parts researcher, power user, internal educator, and

productivity optimizer.



Your job is not just to read about AI tools—but to discover them early, test them deeply, and

translate their real-world value into practical use cases for our teams across product,

engineering, video, operations, and leadership.



AI is moving fast. New tools, agents, and workflows appear weekly. This role exists to make

sure we don’t fall behind—and more importantly, that we actually use what’s possible.

You will work closely with leadership on a daily basis and collaborate with teams across the

company to identify where AI can save time, improve quality, or unlock entirely new capabilities.



Important: This is a fully remote role but only open to applicants currently residing in Cebu City.



What You’ll Do



1. Discover New AI Tools & Products

- Actively research and track new AI tools, platforms, and startups across:

- AI chatbots and copilots

- AI agents and automation tools

- AI-powered SaaS products (e.g., research, negotiation, analytics, content,

operations)

- Monitor AI newsletters, communities, and launch platforms (e.g., AI Valley, AI

Breakfast, product launches, demos, social media, and forums).

- Identify tools early—before they become mainstream—and assess their relevance to

our business.

Example:

Discovering tools like new AI chatbots, AI-powered negotiation tools, AI research

assistants, or emerging agent frameworks and flagging them for internal use.



2. Hands-On Testing & Experimentation

- Personally use and test AI tools to understand:

- What they are actually capable of (not just marketing claims)

- Where they break

- What workflows they truly improve

Explore advanced and creative use cases across areas such as:

- Research and analysis

- Product development and design

- Programming and technical workflows

- Video and content production

- Operations, HR, payroll, and internal processes

- Compare tools against each other and recommend the best option for specific

needs.

This role requires curiosity and experimentation. You are expected to “play,” test,

and push tools to their limits.



3. Internal Knowledge Sharing & Enablement

- Create clear, concise Loom videos, walkthroughs, and internal presentations

explaining:

- What the tool is

- Why it matters

- How we should use it

- Share findings with leadership and relevant teams in a way that is:

- Practical

- Actionable

Easy to adopt

- Maintain internal documentation or tool libraries as needed.

Your goal is to translate complexity into clarity for the rest of the company.



4. Team Collaboration & Workflow Optimization

- Meet regularly with tea
mbers across:

- Product

- Engineering

- Video / Creative

- Operations

- Leadership

- Understand what each team is doing today and identify:

- Where AI could speed things up

- Where AI could improve quality

- Where AI could enable entirely new workflows

- Recommend specific tools, agents, or processes tailored to each role.

Example:

Helping video editors discover better AI UGC tools, helping engineers explore new

coding or agent-based workflows, or helping operations teams automate spreadsheets

and reporting.



5. AI Agents & Future-Facing Workflows

- Research and experiment with AI agents and multi-step automation.

- Explore how AI agents could be used for:

- Research

- Product iteration

- Operations

- Internal tooling

- Help leadership think strategically about how AI should be embedded into how we

build products and run the company.



Who You Are

- Extremely curious and self-directed

- Comfortable learning new tools constantly

- Excited by experimentation, not intimidated by incomplete documentation

- Able to explain technical or complex concepts in simple terms

- Organized enough to track findings, tools, and recommendations

- Comfortable working closely with leadership

- Strong written and verbal English communication skills



Required Skills & Experience

- Strong interest in AI, automation, and emerging technology

- Experience using modern AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude/Opus, copilots, AI

SaaS tools)

- Ability to research independently and synthesize insights

- Experience creating Loom videos, demos, or internal presentations (or willingness to

learn quickly)

- Comfortable working a graveyard shift aligned with US-based teams



Nice to Have (But Not Required)

- Background in product, research, operations, engineering, or content

- Experience testing beta products or early-stage tools

- Familiarity with AI agents, automation platforms, or no-code tools

- Experience working with distributed or remote teams



Why This Role Matters

This role directly impacts:

- Company productivity

- Product quality

- Speed of execution

- Competitive advantage

AI is no longer optional. The AI Tool Researcher ensures we are not just aware of what’s

happening—but actively leveraging it.



Fill-out the form to apply:

title: IT Service Coordinator
description:
Job Opening: IT Service Coordinator (Remote – Philippines)

-Company: Based in California, USA – IT Industry

-Work Hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST

-Engagement: Full-Time



About Us



The company is a U.S.-based Managed Service Provider headquartered in Los Angeles, California. We deliver top-tier IT solutions to small and mid-sized businesses.



We’re looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Project Service Coordinator to be the operational link between our clients, engineers, and leadership team, ensuring IT projects and service requests run smoothly and on schedule.



Key Responsibilities



1. Coordinate tickets, scheduling, and engineer workloads.



2. Ensure SLA targets are met, and escalate risks when needed.



3. Communicate clearly with clients and internal teams on updates.



4. Maintain accurate ticket documentation and project records.



5. Provide reports on ticket queues, project progress, and resource utilization.



6. Identify process gaps and propose improvements.



Requirements:



Must-Have



1. 2+ years in MSP, IT services, or tech coordination.



2. Prior experience working as a Service Coordinator for an MSP using ConnectWise is a MUST.



3. Skilled in ticket triage, dispatching, SLA management, and scheduling.



4. Strong English communication (written & verbal).



5. Proficiency in Microsoft Teams, Excel, and collaboration tools.



Preferred but not required



1. IT Glue or similar documentation tool experience.



2. Prior remote/distributed team experience.



What We Value Most



-Availability & Accountability – We need someone who is consistently available during working hours, manages time independently, and takes responsibility for results.



-Technology & Infrastructure Stability – A stable power and internet setup is critical. Candidates must have backup plans in place to ensure connectivity during outages.



What We Offer



1. Competitive pay: $1200–$1500/month (based on experience)



2. 100% Remote Work (aligned to U.S. Pacific Time)



3. Professional growth & certification opportunities



4. Supportive, collaborative environment driven by our core values



How to Apply

-If you meet the requirements and are excited to join a fast-growing IT company, please apply through OnlineJobs.ph with your resume, a short video introduction (you can use Loom), and details about your availability, accountability practices, and technology setup/backup plans.





Applications without a video will be ignored.



Please send your application with the subject line:

“Applicant for an IT Service Coordinator”

title: Paid Media Specialist (Google Ads & Meta Ads)

title: Cinematic Travel Reel Video Editor
description:
We are Eduardo and Gina, Entrepreneurs and Creators. We have low  and high ticket offers in the US credit & travel space. We are fully nomadic and doing hotel collaborations. We have over 100+ million views across our IG accounts 
 
 we create content that inspire people to learn how to travel in luxury for the fraction of the cost.



We create content with iPhone, Sony A7, DJI Mini Pro 4, Insta360 and Gopro10 around the world.  

We need a skilled cinematic editor who can turn raw travel footage into jaw-dropping viral reels that stop the scroll, build brand desire, attract luxury hotel partnerships and drive more sales for our offers.

This is for a visual storyteller who understands cinematic flow, color, and emotion.



Required Skills:

- 2+ years editing cinematic travel, lifestyle, or luxury brand content

- Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve or a high-end editing program

- Color grading experience, you know how to use LUTs and build your own grades

- Drone footage editing: smooth transitions, altitude reveals, cinematic pace

- Music selection mastery: you find tracks that elevate the emotion, not just fill the silence

- Strong understanding of Instagram Reels pacing and retention hooks

- Fast learner with strong attention to detail and consistency

- Strong communication and quick corrections

- Bonus: experience with creators (especially in travel niche) over 100k followers

- Spanish speaker is a plus as we have a Spanish account as well (yosoyedsoto)



Responsibilities:

- Deliver 5+ cinematic travel reels per week (48 to 72 hour turnaround per reel) with following brand guidelines and skills mentioned above

- Communicate proactively, we use Slack and then frame.io for specific feedback



Compensation & Benefits:

- $20 per edited cinematic reel, based on complexity and length

- Paid per delivery, no hourly caps, no time-tracking overhead

100% remote, work from anywhere in the world

- Flexible schedule, we care about output, not clock-in times

- Long-term opportunity for the right person



How to Apply:

Step 1: Submit your portfolio with at least 3 cinematic travel reels you have edited (links only)

Step 2: Write 3 to 5 sentences on how your editing contributed to measurable results: views, brand deals, follower growth, or engagement.



Next Steps: once selected, we will announce an editing challenge between best participants.

title: Google Ads Specialist (E-commerce & Lead Generation | Remote)

With over 10 years of experience working with clients, the agency continues to grow and is focused on delivering consistent, measurable results through a performance-driven approach.

Our team will review applications and may reach out to suitable candidates for the next step.

title: L2/L3 Systems Engineer Position
description:
Company: MSP based in CA, USA

Location: Remote

Hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST



About Us



We are a growing Managed Service Provider (MSP) based in CA, USA, providing end-to-end IT solutions to our clients. We’re seeking a Level 3 Systems Engineer who excels in infrastructure design, advanced troubleshooting, and project implementation. If you are a reliable professional who thrives in a fast-paced environment and takes ownership of your work, we’d love to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities



-Plan, design, and execute infrastructure projects such as server deployments, migrations, and upgrades.

-Lead Microsoft 365, Azure, and on-prem server migrations and integrations.

-Manage and maintain Windows Server environments (AD, DNS, DHCP, Group Policy).

-Configure and maintain virtualization platforms (VMware, Hyper-V).

-Serve as an escalation point for Level 1 and 2 technicians for advanced troubleshooting.

-Manage cloud environments (Azure, Microsoft 365, AWS if applicable).

-Participate in technical planning, documentation, and client communication.

-Work closely with project managers and internal teams to ensure smooth delivery.



Requirements



1. 5+ years of IT infrastructure or systems administration experience (MSP experience preferred).

2. Expertise in Microsoft Server, Active Directory, Microsoft 365, and Azure.

3. Strong understanding of networking (firewalls, routing, VPNs, VLANs, and switching).

4. Experience with backup and disaster recovery tools (Datto, Veeam, etc.).

5. Familiarity with RMM tools (Ninja, ConnectWise, or similar).

6. Excellent communication, documentation, and problem-solving skills.

7. Certifications (Preferred): Microsoft (MCSA, Azure Admin), VMware VCP, CompTIA Network+/Security+.



What We’re Looking For

-Reliable and accountable, able to meet deadlines and maintain consistent performance.

-Must be willing to take on occasional after-hours work when required for critical tasks or projects

-Fast and stable internet connection and a capable device.

-Have backup plans for power and internet outages.

-Self-motivated, organized, and able to work independently with minimal supervision.



Reliability & Work Environment

We value dependability and accountability. Candidates must have:

-A quiet, dedicated workspace with stable power and internet.

-A primary and backup internet connection and power backup solution.

-A reliable device (laptop or desktop) capable of handling professional IT workloads.



How to Apply

1. To be considered, you must submit the following:

2. Your CV / Resume

3. A short video introduction (introduce yourself, share your background, and why you’re a great fit)



Applications without a video will be ignored.



Please send your application with the subject line:

“Applicant for an "L2/L3 Systems Engineer Position”



Thank you!

title: Customer Support Rep E-Commerce With Fast Growing Brand
description:
We are looking for multiple experienced Customer Support Representatives to join a fast-growing supplement and subscription eCommerce brand. You will manage 100+ daily outbound communications while maintaining warm, personal responses across
, chat, and social channels. This is not an entry-level role; it is for someone confident in their ability to move fast without sacrificing quality. To confirm you have read this far, include the code CS-START at the top of your application.



Key Responsibilities:



Maintain a minimum of 100 outbound communications daily across
, chat, and social comments with zero loss of brand voice or personalisation. Meet First Response Time targets of under 2 hours across all channels without exception. Own ticket resolution end-to-end by diagnosing, resolving, and following up with every customer. Respond to customer inquiries via
, Commslayer, Instagram,
, Reddit, and direct messages. Identify at-risk customers showing churn signals such as complaints, cancellations, or disappointment and flag them for retention outreach. Monitor and respond to community mentions, reviews, and Reddit threads in relevant supplement and health niches. Audit and manage review platform responses with empathy, including public replies and removal flagging where appropriate. Report daily metrics including tickets handled, first response time, resolution rate, CSAT scores, and churn signals. Continuously improve documentation, SOPs, and internal processes based on recurring customer issues.



Essential Requirements



Proven high-volume customer support experience handling 100 or more tickets and outbound messages per day in an eCommerce environment — you must be able to demonstrate this with specific numbers. A minimum of 2 years in eCommerce customer support, with preference given to experience in supplements, nutrition, wellness, or comparable high-review subscription brands. Proficiency with helpdesk software such as Commslayer, Gorgias, Zendesk, Intercom, or similar platforms. Comfortable working with Shopify, basic data tracking, and submitting daily performance reports. Strong written communication that is clear, warm, professional, and on-brand. Ability to manage multiple channels and competing priorities simultaneously. Time zone overlap with the UK of at least 5 hours.



Preferred Qualifications



Experience with Commslayer is a bonus. Review platform management, including flagging experience. Community management or Reddit engagement experience. Knowledge of supplements, nutrition, or functional wellness. Experience writing for social platforms with an understanding of community and viral dynamics. To confirm you have read the responsibilities and requirements in full, include the code REP-100X somewhere in your application response.



This is a remote telecommuting role in accordance with the Philippine Telecommuting Act (RA 11165). The base rate is USD $3.00 per hour. Performance bonuses of between $10 and $50 per month are available based on key metrics, including speed, resolution quality, and consistency. Working hours are 6 hours per day across Day, Swing, or Night shift - clearly state if you want a specific DAY - SWING OR NIGHT shift - or we will arrange this for you during the onboarding process.



You will be asked to answer 5 to 6 scenario-based questions assessing your real-world high-volume support experience, speed, problem-solving ability, and brand voice fit. These are practical situations you will face daily in this role. To show you have read this job description in its entirety, end your application with the code SHIFT-PH-6. Applications missing all three codes — CS-START, REP-100X, and SHIFT-PH-6 — will not be reviewed.



QUESTION LINK - > MAKE A COPY -> SUBMIT RESPONSES IN APPLICATION 



LINK: 
 



YOU MUST INCLUDE A 60-SECOND LOOM/ VIDEO ANSWERING THIS QUESTION: 



Q: WHY SHOULD WE HIRE YOU FOR THIS JOB, AND WHAT IS YOUR RELEVANT EXPERIENCE?



Applicants who meet all the above requirements and are onboarded within the next 24-48 hours.

title: Real Estate Inspection Report Assistant (Template Based, Ongoing Work)
description:
Each report typically takes 20 to 30 minutes once trained. The first few reports may take longer while learning the format. Speed improves quickly with repetition as this is a structured, template based process.



I am looking for a detail oriented Virtual Assistant to help complete real estate inspection reports using a structured template.



This is NOT creative writing. This is template based work that requires accuracy, consistency, and the ability to follow instructions exactly.



You will be given:

 • Photos from property inspections

 • Notes and key details

 • A completed sample report



Your job is to:

 • Fill in General Comments using our template

 • Write short, clear photo captions

 • Input property details and market data

 • Follow formatting exactly as shown



Requirements:

 • Clear and professional written English

 • High attention to detail

 • Able to follow instructions exactly

 • Fast turnaround time

 • Reliable communication



This is ongoing work. You will be paid per completed report.

Consistent work will be given to the right person who is accurate and reliable.



To apply:

Start your application with the word “Savage” so I know you read the instructions.



Then complete the short test below:



1. Write a short General Comment based on the following:

 • 8-unit residential building

 • 6 units occupied, 2 vacant

 • Exterior in overall good condition

 • Minor deferred maintenance observed

 • No interior access

 • Rent roll requested but not provided



2. Rewrite this sentence in a professional tone:

“The wall is messed up and looks like it needs to be fixed soon”



3. Write a brief surrounding area description:

 • Residential neighborhood

 • Similar multi-family homes nearby

 • Small retail stores nearby

 • No new construction observed



Keep your answers clear, simple, and professional.



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be considered.
salary: $5 per report, with bonuses for accuracy

title: Landscape Construction Estimator (Remote – Full Time)
description:
Landscape Construction Estimator / Quantity Take-Off Specialist (Remote | Full-Time)



About Us

Outside is a U.S.-based landscape architecture, construction, and garden care company serving residential clients in Dallas, Texas. For more than two decades we have designed and built gardens grounded in horticultural expertise and shaped by architectural discipline. Our projects include landscape construction, irrigation, drainage, planting, and outdoor living environments. 



We are seeking a Remote Landscape Construction Estimator / Quantity Take-Off Specialist to support our Landscape Architect / Estimator with take-offs, estimate preparation, and subcontractor bid coordination.

This is a long-term remote position supporting a professional construction team.



Role Overview



The Landscape Construction Estimator prepares the technical components of project estimates so the Landscape Architect / Estimator can focus on pricing strategy, scope definition, and client communication.

This role involves construction plan review, quantity take-offs, project budgeting, subcontractor bid coordination, and estimate preparation.



Training will be provided in LMN estimating software, which we use to prepare construction estimates.



Key Responsibilities



Your work will include:

• Performing construction quantity take-offs from drawings and plans

• Measuring landscape construction quantities including patios, walkways, walls, planting areas, irrigation, and drainage

• Preparing project budgeting estimates for early client review

• Preparing quantity summaries and estimate worksheets

• Assisting with building estimates in LMN estimating software

• Creating and distributing subcontractor bid packets

• Following up with subcontractors regarding bid submissions

• Organizing and comparing subcontractor bids

• Assisting with answering subcontractor questions and routing technical questions to the estimator

• Preparing estimate summaries and proposal documentation

• Maintaining organized project and estimating files



Required Skills



• Experience performing construction quantity take-offs

• Ability to read and interpret construction drawings

• Strong math and measurement skills

• Strong Microsoft Excel skills

• High attention to detail

• Excellent written English communication

• Reliable internet connection and remote work setup



Preferred Experience:



Experience with any of the following is highly valued:

• Bluebeam Revu

• Planswift or other digital take-off software

• Landscape construction estimating

• Site work, irrigation, or drainage estimating

• Working remotely with U.S. construction companies



Training Provided



You will receive training in:

• LMN estimating software

• Our estimating workflow and systems

• Landscape construction estimating procedures



Ideal Candidate:



The ideal candidate is:

• Highly detail-oriented

• Comfortable working with measurements and numbers

• Organized and systematic

• Able to work independently in a remote environment

• Calm and reliable under deadline pressure

• Interested in long-term work with a construction company



Position Details:



• Full-time remote position

• 40 hours per week

• Long-term role with growth opportunities

• Work directly with a U.S.-based estimating team



Application Instructions:



Please include the following in your application:

- A short introduction about your estimating experience

- The take-off or estimating software you have used

- An example of a construction take-off you have completed



Short Skills Question:



Imagine you are reviewing a drawing for a patio that measures 20 feet by 30 feet.



Please answer:

- What is the square footage of the patio?

- If pavers require 10% waste, what is the total square footage of material required?



Include your answers in your application.



Important:

To confirm you read the entire job description, please begin your application message with the word:

Landscape

As a Customer Service Representative, you will play a critical role in fostering positive relationships with our clients and ensuring that their maintenance needs are met effectively and efficiently. Your work will directly impact customer satisfaction and help maintain our reputation for excellence in the maintenance industry.

mbers to ensure the smooth flow of maintenance services from start to finish.

- Service Knowledge: Stay informed about the company’s maintenance offerings and ensure clients are fully aware of the services available to them.

- Performs other duties that may be assigned from time to time.



Desired Qualifications:

title: US IT Recruiter
description:
We are a global IT consulting firm headquartered in Atlanta, GA, dedicated to building successful IT careers. We support our clients with project-based staffing across various technologies including Android and iPhone Mobile Development, AWS, Big Data, Data Science, Exchange, Cybersecurity, and Azure. With a growing base of around 500 clients globally, we've successfully built careers for thousands over the past two decades. Our mission is to help individuals and businesses find, build, and grow their next big dream. 



About the Role 

We are looking for a driven and detail-oriented IT Recruiter to join our growing team. In this role, you will be responsible for managing end-to-end recruitment processes, building relationships with candidates and hiring managers, and ensuring we attract top-tier IT talent across North America. You'll play a key role in shaping our talent acquisition efforts by combining smart sourcing strategies with strong candidate engagement and process management. 

We are looking for a motivated and results-driven Recruiter based in Philippines to join our growing team. This is a fully remote opportunity for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment and is comfortable handling high-volume outbound calls daily.

If you enjoy speaking with candidates, screening talent quickly, and working with targets — this role is for you.

Key Responsibilities

• Conduct high-volume outbound calls (100–150+ calls per day) to source and screen candidates

• Qualify candidates based on client requirements

• Schedule interviews and coordinate with hiring managers

• Maintain accurate candidate records in ATS/CRM systems

• Follow up consistently with candidates

• Meet daily and weekly recruitment KPIs

• Source candidates through job portals, LinkedIn, referrals, and other platforms

Requirements

• 1–3+ years of experience in recruitment, sales, telemarketing, or high-volume calling roles

• Excellent verbal communication skills in English (B2+ or Native level preferred)

• Comfortable making 100+ calls per day

• Strong organizational and time-management skills

• Ability to work independently in a remote environment

• Stable internet connection and quiet workspace

Compensation

• Independent contractor (1099) structure

• Competitive monthly compensation (USD-based)

• Performance-based incentives

Ideal Candidate Profile

• Energetic and confident on calls

• Target-oriented and self-motivated

• Thick-skinned and resilient (not discouraged by rejection)

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced, metrics-driven environment

title: Full-Time Social Media Manager – US Real Estate | Individual Contributor
description:
We’re looking for a driven Social Media Manager in the Philippines to work remotely and make a real impact, supporting a team of top-producing, established residential real estate agents. This is a great opportunity for someone who is growth-minded, creative, and eager to take ownership of social media strategies that drive real results.



***Important*** This is a full-time role for one dedicated individual. We are not considering agencies, teams, partnerships, or candidates who outsource or share responsibilities. We are seeking a tea
mber who will perform all work independently. We have several other VAs on our team, and we look forward to meeting you!



Your Future Team



The Krishnan Team, founded in 2009 by Ruth Krishnan, ranks among the top 3 teams in San Francisco and has sold over $1B in real estate. What keeps them at the top is a strong culture of self-improvement, learning, and collaboration. The team fosters a fun, inclusive environment, and contributes 5% of revenue to community organizations.



The Opportunity



Watch Ruth explain exactly what she's looking for in this role (copy/paste): 



This is not a typical social media role.



You will work independently under the direction of a Marketing Manager, while collaborating with leadership to execute a sophisticated, data-driven content strategy.



This role is ideal for someone who:

*Thinks critically and asks thoughtful questions

*Takes ownership and executes without constant oversight

*Is curious, proactive, and committed to continuous improvement



You will shape the brand voice, transform raw content into compelling stories, and directly impact lead generation and market positioning.



The Role



We are looking for someone who is resourceful, proactive, and highly self-directed.



This is an individual contributor role. You are expected to:



*Manage your own workload and deadlines

*Execute all assigned tasks personally

*Communicate clearly and proactively

*Take full accountability for results

*You enjoy building scalable systems and creating content that drives engagement and business growth.



We Know You



You are:

*A self-starter who works independently without reliance on others

*Comfortable owning your work from start to finish

*Organized, detail-oriented, and deadline-driven

*Adaptable in a fast-paced environment

*Proactive in identifying opportunities and solving problems

*Willing to speak up, ask questions, and seek clarity

*You thrive in a role where you are trusted to deliver, take initiative, and continuously improve.



What You’ll Do



Content Creation & Video Editing

*Edit short-form video content (Reels) using tools like CapCut

*Transform raw footage into polished, high-impact content

*Write compelling, SEO-optimized captions using LLMs (e.g., Gemini, ChatGPT)

*Design graphics and carousels using Canva and AI tools





Social Media Management & Execution

*Manage day-to-day Instagram operations (posting, scheduling, engagement)

*Implement social SEO strategies (keywords, geo-tagging, alt text)

*Monitor trends and algorithm changes and recommend improvements



Analytics & Systems Development

*Track KPIs and translate performance into actionable insights

*Build and document workflows (e.g., Asana)

*Continuously optimize content and systems



Qualifications & Desired Skills

*Proven experience as a Social Media Manager or Content Creator 2+ years

*Strong video editing skills (short-form/Reels)

*Understanding of social media SEO and content strategy

*Strong copywriting and communication skills

*Highly organized and self-motivated

*Experience building systems and processes





Tools:

*Instagram,

*Canva, CapCut

*Google Suite



Later or similar scheduling tools

*Asana or similar project management tools

*ManyChat

*AI tools (ChatGPT, Gemini, Copilot)





Bonus:

*Experience in luxury real estate or high-net-worth audience



Requirements (IMPORTANT)



To be considered, you must:

*Be applying as an individual (not an agency, team, or partnership)

*Perform all work yourself (no outsourcing or subcontracting)

*Be available full-time (40 hours/week)

*Work during 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST

*Have a dedicated, distraction-free workspace

*Have reliable high-speed internet



***Applications from agencies, teams, or candidates intending to delegate work will not be considered.***



The Details

*Salary: $1,000–$1,800 USD/month, based on experience

*Benefits: Paid Time Off

*Location: Remote (Philippines only)

*Office: San Francisco, CA



Technical Requirements

*CPU: Intel/AMD 64-bit, 2GHz+

*RAM: 8GB+

*GPU: 2GB+

*Wired internet (minimum 10 Mbps)

*Headset



How to Apply



*Submit your resume in PDF format

*Include links to relevant work samples

*Do not contact the team directly

*Applications that do not follow instructions will not be considered.

title: Part-Time Node.js Developer — AI Automation (Long-Term, Growth Role)
description:
I'm a CTO building AI-powered automation for a small business portfolio in the US. I'm looking for a reliable, part-time Node.js developer to start by maintaining a simple SMS bot, then grow into building AI workflows across my businesses.



This is a long-term role. I want one person who grows with me — not a revolving door of freelancers. If you do great work, hours and pay increase.



Starting work (Phase 1):

- Review and maintain an Express.js + Claude API webhook server (~150 lines)

- Deploy to Railway hosting

- Security review (HMAC-SHA256, rate limiting)

- Bug fixes and monitoring



Growth work (Phase 2+):

- Build AI agent workflows using Anthropic Claude API

- API integrations (Square, OpenPhone)

- New automation for multiple businesses

- Potential SaaS projects



Required skills:

- Node.js and Express (1-2+ years experience)

- REST API and webhook experience

- Git and GitHub

- Good written English (we communicate async via chat)



Nice to have:

- AI/LLM API experience (Anthropic Claude API)

- Deployment to Railway, Vercel, Render, or similar

- SMS API experience



The team:

There's a senior developer on the team who handles bigger projects. He's not involved day-to-day on this work, but as things scale and you prove yourself, there's opportunity to collaborate on larger builds together.



Schedule & Pay:

- 10-12 hours per week to start

- Flexible schedule — I care about output, not clock-watching

- Some overlap with US Pacific time preferred but not required

- Room to grow to 20+ hours and higher pay

- Include your salary expectations in your application



How to apply:

Tell me about yourself in 3-4 sentences. Share one project you've built that involves APIs or webhooks. If you have AI/LLM experience, mention it. Tell me your timezone and available hours.



I read every application personally. Don't send a generic template — tell me something real.

title: Influencer Outreach Specialist — US Supplement Brand (YouTube & Facebook/IG Focus)
description:
We're a US-based premium supplement brand in the alcohol health market looking for an experienced outreach specialist to identify, contact, and manage relationships with influencers and creators across YouTube and
/Instagram'ers.



Our core audience is health-conscious adults 40-60+, mostly women. Think wellness, liver health, longevity, gut health, healthy aging... people who enjoy a drink or two, not bodybuilding or fitness bro content.



What you'll be doing:



• Researching and identifying well-aligned creators (micro to macro) on YouTube and
/IG

• Running personalized outreach to pitch product seeding, affiliate partnerships, and paid collaborations

• Managing ongoing creator relationships, follow-ups, and tracking

• Vetting creators for genuine audience alignment (not just follower count)

• Reporting weekly on outreach volume, response rates, and pipeline status



What we're looking for:



• Prior extensive experience doing influencer outreach specifically for supplement, wellness, or health brands. This is non-negotiable. Please share examples.



• Strong written English. Your outreach
s need to feel like they're coming from someone on our team, not a template blast.



• Good instincts for brand alignment. You should be able to look at a creator's content and audience and know within 60 seconds whether they're a fit.



• Self-starter. We'll give you direction but you need to own the process day to day.



• Someone who is relentless and takes personal responsibility who is consistent, persistent, and loves being part of a fun team.



In your application, please include:



1. 2-3 examples of supplement or wellness brands you've done influencer outreach for and what results looked like



2. Pick 3 YouTube or
 creators you'd pitch our brand to and tell us in one sentence each why they're a good fit (our site is 
)



3. What software or tools you use for influencer discovery and outreach management. If you don't use any, explain your manual process in detail.



4. How many creators can you realistically identify, vet, and do personalized outreach to per week?



This is an ongoing role, not a one-off project. Starting at 20 hrs/week with room to grow to full time.



We have scaled well on Meta and Google ads and now want to really drive hard into Youtube integrations/dedicated videos, IG and FB promos, and maybe X promotions. Not interested in Tiktok.



We want to create a social snowball of authority similar to companies like AG1, Seed, and more.



We want someone who can build this channel the way a strong in-house marketing hire would.

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview: 



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office. 



 

Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents. 



 

About Power Plus Systems: 



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission. 



 

Objectives: 

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.



 

Competencies: 

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.



 

Equipment Requirements:  

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.



 

Physical Requirements: 

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.

 

Benefits: 

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply: 



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below. 




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply. 



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: VA Mortgage Operations Assistant
description:

Join Us as a Mortgage Operations Associate (Virtual Assistant)

Are you detail-oriented, organized, and eager to grow your career in the mortgage industry—all from the comfort of your home?

We’re looking for a Mortgage Operations Associate (VA) to help streamline our backend operations, ensure accurate loan documentation, and provide vital administrative support to our mortgage team.

This is a great opportunity for someone with strong administrative or financial experience who thrives in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment and values the flexibility of remote work.



---

- Support loan officers and processors with client files and documentation

- Input and update loan data in CRM and LOS systems

- Track deadlines and follow up on outstanding documents or signatures

- Coordinate with third-party vendors (appraisers, title companies, etc.)

- Prepare and organize files for underwriting and closing

- Manage
s and general administrative tasks with professionalism

---

---

- ???? Meaningful Work – Contribute to a role where precision and reliability make a real difference



---

? Ready to Get Started?

Apply now and take the next step in your virtual assistant career with us!

title: Google Ads Specialist (Remote – High Income Opportunity)
description:
We are looking for a talented and results-driven Google Ads Specialist to join our team. This is an exciting opportunity for individuals who are experienced in running high-performing campaigns and want to grow in a fast-paced, performance-oriented environment.



If you are confident in your ability to generate results and scale campaigns effectively, this role offers both high earning potential and clear career advancement.



Key Responsibilities



Plan, launch, and optimize Google Ads campaigns (Search, Display, YouTube)



Conduct in-depth keyword research and competitor analysis



Monitor and improve campaign performance based on key metrics such as CTR, CPC, CPA, and ROAS



Perform A/B testing to enhance ad performance and conversion rates



Analyze data and provide actionable insights to scale campaigns



Manage advertising budgets efficiently to maximize ROI



Prepare performance reports and share insights with the team



Requirements



Proven experience running Google Ads campaigns with measurable results



Strong understanding of campaign structure, bidding strategies, and conversion tracking



Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret and act on data



Experience with tools such as Google Analytics and Google Tag Manager



Ability to work independently and manage multiple campaigns



Prior experience in performance marketing is highly preferred



Compensation & Benefits



Competitive base salary based on experience



High commission and performance-based bonuses



Unlimited income potential for top performers



100% remote working environment



Clear career growth path to Senior Specialist or Manager roles



Opportunity to work on large-scale and international campaigns



We are prioritizing candidates who are currently running ads or have hands-on experience and are ready to take their career to the next level.



Please send your CV to: 



Our company is looking forward to welcoming you to our team and growing together in the near future.

description:

Oversee day-to-day project operations and ensure tasks are executed on schedule

Coordinate with different team members (design, marketing, operations, etc.)

Track progress and make sure deadlines are met

Identify bottlenecks and resolve issues before they affect delivery

Maintain project documentation and organize workflows

title: Influencer Marketing Coordinator for Japanese Brands
description:
?About the Role?

We are a Japanese marketing company specializing in helping Japanese brands enter the Philippine and Southeast Asian markets through influencer marketing.



We are looking for a well-connected Filipino coordinator who has existing relationships with local content creators and can hit the ground running. If you already know influencers personally — whether from past brand work, your own content creation, or simply through your social circle — you are exactly who we are looking for.



This starts as a part-time, remote position with revenue sharing. As our business grows, this will evolve into a full-time role with a fixed monthly salary.



?What You Will Do?

Influencer Sourcing & Network Activation: Leverage your existing creator network to quickly onboard quality influencers for campaigns. Continuously expand the database to 500+ creators across beauty, food, lifestyle, and wellness.

Outreach & Negotiation: Reach out to influencers — both from your existing network and new ones — negotiate compensation, and confirm participation.

Campaign Coordination: Manage posting schedules, send reminders, and ensure all content goes live on time.

Content Review: Review content before posting for quality, brand alignment, and proper disclosures (#ad, #sponsored).

Data Collection: Gather post insights (reach, engagement, impressions) and input into reporting sheets.

Payment Processing: Handle influencer payments via GCash or other local methods.

Trend Monitoring: Track Philippine social media trends and flag emerging creators weekly.

Relationship Management: Be the main point of contact for all creators. Nurture long-term relationships so influencers prioritize our campaigns.



?What We Are Looking For?



An existing personal network of Filipino content creators — you should be able to reach at least 10–20 influencers directly right now. This is the single most important requirement.KEY REQUIREMENT

Fluent in English and Filipino (Tagalog) — you will communicate with both Japanese clients and Filipino creators

Deep understanding of Philippine social media — you know who is trending, what content formats work, and why certain creators resonate

Proactive communicator — you send updates without being asked and flag problems early

Reliable with deadlines — if you commit to something, you deliver it

Past experience in brand collaborations — either as a coordinator, manager, or even as a content creator yourself

Connections to beauty, lifestyle, food, or wellness creators — these are the niches we work in most

Interest in Japanese culture, products, or brands — passion for what we represent makes a big difference

Media or PR contacts — a bonus as we plan to expand into PR services

title: Lesson Plan Writer — Social-Emotional Learning
description:
About GrowthMinded

GrowthMinded creates evidence-based curriculum that equips students of all ages with the inner skills they need to thrive. Our content is built around five core competencies: confidence, emotional intelligence, growth mindset, adaptability, and resilience. We believe these skills are just as foundational as any academic subject.



The role

We are looking for an exceptional full-time lesson plan writer to develop curriculum across all grade levels (K–12) for our five core skill areas. You will work closely with our curriculum lead to produce engaging, age-appropriate, and pedagogically sound lesson plans that teachers can pick up and run with.



This is a fully remote, full-time contract role. You will be expected to meet weekly output targets and attend regular check-ins.



What you will do

Write structured, classroom-ready lesson plans for confidence, EI, growth mindset, adaptability, and resilience

Adapt lessons across grade levels (K–12), ensuring age-appropriate language, activities, and objectives

Follow our established template and quality standards (sample will be provided upon shortlisting)

Incorporate revisions based on feedback and maintain a consistent tone and pedagogy across the library



You are a strong fit if you

Have a background in education, curriculum development, psychology, or a related field

Have experience writing or teaching SEL, character education, or growth mindset content

Write clearly, warmly, and at the right level for your audience — whether Grade 2 or Grade 11

Are self-directed, meet deadlines consistently, and take feedback well

Are genuinely passionate about helping young people develop inner strength — not just looking for writing work







How to apply

Please send all of the following to 
 with the subject line "GrowthMinded Lesson Writer – [Your Name]":



1. Your resume/CV

2. An original sample lesson plan written for this application

Choose any one of our five core skills (EI, growth mindset, adaptability, confidence, resilience) and any grade level. There is no template required — we want to see how you think. Keep it to one lesson (15 minutes).



3. A short video introduction (3 minutes max)

Record a casual, unlisted video (YouTube, Google Drive, or Loom) and share the link. Tell us who you are, what draws you to social-emotional learning, and why you're the right person for this role.

title: Sales Closer/Sales Representative
description:
Remote High-Ticket Sales Closer (Wellness / Healthcare)

Compensation:

$8.00/hour base + uncapped high-ticket commissions

On-Target Earnings (OTE): $4,000–$7,000+ per month

Job Type: Full-Time

Location: Remote (Work from Home)

Schedule: U.S. Eastern Time hours required

________________________________________

Who This Role Is For

This role is exclusively for proven high-ticket closers. If you consistently close premium offers through phone or video consultations and thrive in a performance-driven environment, this opportunity is built for you.

Tesla BioHealing is scaling rapidly with strong inbound demand in the bioenergy wellness space. We are seeking disciplined, ethical closers who can confidently guide clients through high-value purchasing decisions while delivering a white-glove, consultative experience.

________________________________________

What You’ll Be Closing

• High-ticket wellness and therapeutic solutions

• Deal sizes typically $1,000–$5,000+

• Qualified inbound leads + strategic outbound opportunities

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

• Close high-ticket inbound and outbound sales calls

• Lead structured virtual consultations (phone & video)

• Diagnose client needs and present tailored solutions

• Handle objections confidently and close decisively

• Consistently hit or exceed weekly and monthly revenue targets

• Maintain accurate CRM records and pipeline visibility

• Deliver a premium, trust-based buying experience

________________________________________

Required Qualifications (Non-Negotiable)

• 5+ years of phone or virtual sales experience

• Documented success closing high-ticket offers ($1K+)

• Availability to work U.S. Eastern Time hours

• Strong objection-handling, persuasion, and closing skills

• High emotional intelligence and consultative sales approach

• Self-managed, disciplined, and results-oriented

• Comfortable in a metrics-driven sales culture

________________________________________

Strongly Preferred

• Healthcare, wellness, or medical-adjacent sales experience

• Inbound high-intent lead environment background

• Proficiency with CRM tools and remote sales systems

•Social Media Influencer sourcing and management + Sales closing experience +
 platform management as a plus

•Doctor’s office or any medical related office lead generation, scheduling, and service sales closing

•Web designer – Shopify webpage experienced

•Hotel / Hospitality Event Sales – Lead generation, nurturing, appointment setting, closing, upselling – experience required

________________________________________

What We Offer

• Hourly base + uncapped commissions

• Realistic $4K–$7K+ monthly OTE

• Fully remote work environment

• Qualified leads and strong market demand

• Product, sales, and ongoing performance training

• Long-term growth and leadership opportunities

________________________________________

How to Apply

This is a selective role.

Please submit:

1. Your resume

2. A 2-minute video introduction covering:

o Your high-ticket closing experience

o Average deal size closed

o Monthly revenue you’ve historically produced

o Why you’re a strong fit for Tesla BioHealing

3. Your LinkedIn profile

Record your video introduction as to why you're a right fit and
 both to:



Subject: High-Ticket Sales Closer – Remote

title: General Marketing Teammate
description:
? About the Company ?

We are a global marketing agency committed to empowering global excellence since 2018.



? About the Role ?

We are continuously seeking full-time digital marketing professionals to join our growing team.



As a boutique international agency, our roles are highly flexible and often span across multiple marketing functions such as influencer marketing, PR, social media, and integrated marketing campaigns (IMC). Responsibilities frequently shift based on project needs and client priorities.



? Please Read Carefully Before Applying ?

We place great value on integrity, responsibility, and proactivity. While we’ve had excellent long-term collaborations through this platform (some lasting over 1.5 years), we’ve also encountered unfortunate cases where candidates left without notice or acted dishonestly.



To ensure a good fit for both sides, please read the following carefully before applying.



DO NOT apply if you:

3. High sense of responsibility.

4. Quick and eager learner.

5. Ability to adapt to change and perform under pressure.

6. Excellent communication skills.

7. Strong attention to detail.

title: Help Desk IT Specialist
description:
Help Desk Support Specialist (Remote, Full-Time)



We’re a fast-moving, tech-forward team looking for a highly skilled IT pro.

We’re searching for a Help Desk Support Specialist with serious technical chops — someone who thrives in dynamic environments, loves solving complex problems, and brings both depth and curiosity to their work. This isn’t a basic ticket-taker role. You’ll be the person our team relies on to diagnose, troubleshoot, and resolve issues across modern cloud platforms, networks, and devices.

If you’re energized by autonomy, ownership, and the chance to make a real impact, you’ll fit right in.



Who We Are

We’re a lean, ambitious, and tech-driven team that operates with startup speed and zero bureaucracy. We move fast, collaborate openly, and constantly push to improve our systems and ourselves. Everyone here has a voice, and everyone’s ideas matter.



Our Culture



Built for Builders

We love people who go deep — the ones who can’t resist digging into logs, optimizing workflows, or reverse-engineering a weird issue until it finally clicks. If you’re wired to figure things out, you’ll thrive here.



Remote-First, Trust-Driven

We don’t micromanage. We give you ownership, flexibility, and the freedom to do your best work. What matters is impact, not hours.



Collaboration Without the Corporate Fluff

We communicate openly, help each other out, and jump in wherever needed. No politics, no silos, no “that’s not my job.”



Always Improving

We’re constantly refining our processes, tools, and documentation. If you see a better way to do something, we want you to run with it.



Tech-Forward Mindset

We’re not just support — we’re problem-solvers, system thinkers, and technical strategists. Curiosity and experimentation are part of the job.



Human-Centered Support

Even with all the tech, we never forget the human side. We treat every user with patience, clarity, and respect.



How to Apply (Please Read Carefully)

To be considered, you must submit the following through the job platform’s messaging system:

•  A link to a short introductory video explaining why you're a strong candidate

•  Your resume

•  Your profile link on this job platform

Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



Key Responsibilities

•  Provide expert-level support via phone, chat, and

•  Diagnose and resolve complex hardware, software, and network issues

•  Support and troubleshoot Microsoft 365, including:

•  Outlook (profiles, mail flow, advanced configuration)

•  Teams (permissions, meetings, call quality, device integration)

•  SharePoint (permissions, file sync, site access)

•  Manage user accounts, authentication, and permissions

•  Maintain detailed documentation and update support tickets

•  Collaborate on internal IT projects and system improvements

•  Meet and exceed performance metrics such as response time, resolution rate, and customer satisfaction



Required Qualifications

•  5+ years of hands-on technical support experience

•  Strong troubleshooting skills across hardware, software, networking, and cloud platforms

•  Advanced proficiency with Microsoft 365, including Outlook, Teams, SharePoint, and admin functions

•  Experience with remote desktop tools and enterprise ticketing systems

•  Strong understanding of Windows, macOS, and mobile OS environments

•  Solid grasp of networking fundamentals (DNS, DHCP, VPN, firewalls, Wi?Fi)

•  Knowledge of cybersecurity best practices

•  Experience supporting VOIP phone systems

•  Working knowledge of office printers

•  Excellent English communication skills

•  Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple priorities



Preferred technical experience:

•  Unifi

•  Microsoft 365 administration 
, apps, SharePoint, Teams policies)



Work-From-Home Requirements

•  Quiet, dedicated workspace

•  Reliable computer with up-to-date hardware and dual monitors

•  High-speed internet (50 Mbps minimum recommended)

•  Noise-canceling headset, microphone, and smartphone connected to WiFi

•  Webcam for meetings and ticket reviews

•  Familiarity with VPNs and secure authentication methods



Bonus Points

•  Certifications such as CompTIA A+, Network+, Security+, or Microsoft

•  Experience supporting cloud platforms (Microsoft 365, Google Workspace)

•  Multilingual support

•  Ability to work flexible shifts or participate in on-call rotations



Ready to Apply?

If you’re a technically strong IT professional who thrives in a fast-moving, startup-style environment, submit your application with all required materials listed above. We can’t wait to meet you.

title: SEO Strategist / Account Lead (Agency)
description:
Salary: 62,000 – 88,000 PHP / month (full-time, long-term)



About Us



We’re a growing SEO agency serving multiple client accounts. We already have:



- Assistants handling outreach, backlinks, content publishing, and GMB posting



- Technical audits being completed



What we’re looking for: Ownership.



We’re looking for an experienced SEO Strategist / Account Lead who can turn activity into results: rankings, traffic and leads for clients, and who can direct others rather than do everything themselves.



This is a stable, long-term role. You will have full ownership of SEO strategy, supported by an existing execution team.



Your Role (Read This Carefully)



This is not a junior SEO role and not a task-based execution role.



You will:



- Own SEO strategy for multiple client accounts



- D
 what matters most for each client



- Turn audits, content and links into a clear roadmap



- Direct assistants on what to do and why



- Monitor performance and explain results (or lack of results)



- Be accountable for SEO outcomes



You will not be expected to:



- Build backlinks daily



- Write blog posts



- Post on GMB profiles



- Execute technical fixes yourself



You d
 the plan. Others execute.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



- Keyword & page prioritisation (revenue-focused)



- On-page optimisation strategy



- Internal linking strategy



- Link strategy (which pages, anchors, velocity)



- Local SEO strategy (GMB optimisation & direction)



- Reviewing content briefs and published work



- Interpreting GSC / GA4 / Ahrefs data



- Creating simple, clear client SEO roadmaps



- Explaining why results are moving (or not)



Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)



Please do not apply unless you meet all of these:



- 5+ years hands-on SEO experience



- Experience working in an SEO agency



- Experience managing multiple client accounts



- Comfortable directing junior tea
mbers



- Strong understanding of lead-generation SEO



- Able to explain SEO strategy clearly in writing



If you’ve only worked on your own sites or only followed checklists, this role is not a fit.



Tools We Use



- Google Search Console



- Google Analytics (GA4)



- Ahrefs / SEMrush



- Google Sheets / Docs



Compensation



- To be discussed depending on experience



- Performance bonuses based on results & client retention



- Long-term role with room to grow as the agency grows



How We Measure Success



- Clear SEO roadmaps for every client



- Pages moving, not just tasks completed



- Organic traffic and lead growth



- Clients staying because progress is obvious



Application Instructions (Important)



To apply, answer the questions below in detail. Applications without answers will be ignored.



1. Briefly describe your SEO experience in agencies.



(What types of clients? Local, national, lead gen, etc.)



2. A local service business is stuck on page 2 for its main keyword.



What are the top 3 actions you would take in the next 60 days and why?



3. How do you d
 which pages deserve backlinks?



4. Which SEO result are you most proud of, and why did it work?



Final Note



This role is for someone who wants ownership, not micromanagement.



If you’re comfortable being responsible for results, and directing others to execute your plan, we want to hear from you.



We are not looking for perfection on day one - we value clear thinking, ownership and steady improvement.



Optional (Highly Recommended)



If you want to stand out, include a short Loom video (3–5 mins) explaining how you think about SEO strategy.

title: SEO Assistant
description:
We are hiring an SEO Assistant to join our growing UK-based SEO agency, working exclusively with estate agents and real estate businesses.



This is a long-term remote role for someone who is organised, reliable, communicates clearly, and already has practical SEO experience.



You will support our SEO team across multiple client accounts, helping deliver recurring monthly SEO work inside clear internal systems and processes.



This role is ideal for someone who is comfortable following structure, pays attention to detail, communicates proactively, and takes pride in consistent work.



## What you’ll be doing



* Supporting monthly SEO delivery across client accounts

* Keyword research and competitor checks

* Working inside Ahrefs and Google Search Console

* Monitoring rankings, indexing and visibility data

* Supporting on-page SEO tasks

* Uploading and formatting content where needed

* Assisting with local SEO activities

* Following task checklists and internal SOPs

* Providing clear updates on progress and deadlines



## Requirements



* Practical SEO experience (agency or freelance is fine)

* Comfortable using Ahrefs

* Comfortable using Google Search Console

* Good understanding of on-page SEO fundamentals

* Strong written English

* Strong communication and responsiveness

* Reliable working hours and daily availability

* High attention to detail

* Able to follow systems rather than freestyle



## Important



Communication is extremely important in this role.



We value reliability, clarity, and consistency just as much as technical skill.



If you struggle to communicate clearly, disappear during working hours, or regularly miss updates, this role will not be the right fit.



## Nice to have



* Experience with ClickUp

* Experience with WordPress

* Experience with local SEO

* Basic understanding of technical SEO



## Working hours



You will work within our existing team structure, with overlap into UK business hours.



## To apply



Please include:



1. Your SEO experience

2. Which SEO tools you use most often

3. Your preferred working hours

4. A short example of an SEO task you completed recently



To show you have read this properly:



* Start your application with **PURPLE**

* If AI has been used to help prepare your response, start with **AI-PURPLE** instead



Applications that do not follow this instruction will not be considered.

title: Full Time Video Editor for Gaming YouTube Channel
description:
Job Title: Part Time Video Editor for Gaming YouTube Channel (UndeadRuns)



About the Channel:

UndeadRuns is a YouTube gaming channel focused on roguelite and indie 

games. We upload daily and are looking for a reliable part time editor 

to work with us long term.



About the Role:

This is a part time remote position with consistent daily work. 

Approximately 3-4 hours of work per day, 7 days a week.



Daily Tasks:

- Edit 1 x full gameplay video (approximately 1 hour raw footage)

- Create 3-5 short clips for YouTube Shorts from the same footage

- Design 1 x thumbnail per video

- Turnaround required within 24 hours



Style:

Dark gothic comedy gaming channel. Think MediEvil PS1 humour — self 

aware, funny but atmospheric. Please watch MoistCr1TiKaL gaming videos
