title: Podcast Specialist
description:
About Short For
dia

At Short For
dia, we specialize in transforming long-form video content into powerful short-form assets designed to engage, grow, and convert audiences. We work with thought leaders, entrepreneurs, and businesses to maximize the reach of their content through high-quality, strategic, and consistent output.

Our podcast production service manages the full client journey — from studio booking and planning to directing, editing, and posting. We're now looking for a Podcast Specialist to own the publishing, engagement, and performance side of that pipeline.



The Role

We're hiring a Podcast Specialist to manage the end-to-end publishing workflow for our podcast clients, monitor and engage with their audiences across platforms, and deliver clear performance reports that show real results.

This role is perfect for someone who lives and breathes podcasts and short-form content, understands what makes clips perform, and knows how to translate data into actionable insights. You'll work closely with our editing, creative directors, and account management teams to make sure every episode and every clip lands the way it should.



Key Responsibilities:



Podcast Publishing & Scheduling

-Manage and schedule podcast episode uploads across all relevant platforms (Spotify, Apple Podcasts, YouTube, etc.)

-Ensure short-form clips derived from each episode are posted consistently across TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

-Maintain and execute content calendars for each podcast client, ensuring a minimum publishing cadence is met every week

-Coordinate with editors and content teams to ensure assets are ready and approved before scheduled publish times

-Troubleshoot and resolve any upload errors, formatting issues, or scheduling failures quickly



Engagement Management

-Monitor comments, replies, and messages across podcast and social media platforms for all clients

-Engage with audiences in a way that reflects each client's brand voice

-Flag any notable comments, feedback, or opportunities to the account management team

-Identify trending conversations or topics within each client's niche that could inform future content



Performance Tracking & Reporting

-Track key metrics across all platforms: views, watch time, follower growth, engagement rate, reach, and more

-Build and deliver weekly performance reports for each client summarizing content output, top-performing clips, and key takeaways

-Identify trends and patterns in the data to help improve content strategy and posting schedules

-Work closely with Account Managers to align reporting with each client's goals and KPIs



Workflow & Team Collaboration

-Coordinate with the editing team to flag any content issues before publishing

-Maintain organized records of published content, scheduling logs, and performance data

-Communicate proactively with internal teams if deadlines are at risk or issues arise

-Support continuous improvement of the publishing workflow as the podcast roster grows



Qualifications & Skills:



Required

-Experience managing podcast publishing or social media accounts professionally

-Strong understanding of major podcast platforms (Spotify, Apple Podcasts, YouTube) and short-form platforms (TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts)

-Solid grasp of social media analytics and performance metrics

-Experience creating reports and presenting data in a clear, client-friendly format

-Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple clients and deadlines simultaneously

-Excellent written communication skills in English

-Availability full-time (40 hrs/week) during EST business hours



Preferred

-Familiarity with scheduling and social media management tools (e.g., Metricool, Airtable, 
)

-Experience working at a content agency or with multiple clients at once

-Understanding of U.S. culture, trends, and what drives engagement on short-form platforms

-Basic knowledge of project management tools (ClickUp, Airtable, etc.)

-Genuine passion for podcasts and the short-form content space



What You'll Get

-Full-time, long-term remote role

-Consistent workload with clear workflows and expectations

-A collaborative team that's serious about quality and growth

-The opportunity to become a core part of our podcast production pipeline

-A no-BS, no-ego environment where your work actually moves the needle



How to Apply

-Your resume

-2–3 examples of podcast or social media accounts you've managed

-A brief description of your experience with performance reporting

-Your expected monthly salary

title: UGC & Project Manager
description:
About The Visionary Group (TVG)



Welcome to The Visionary Group. We are a close knit e-commerce growth team of brand builders, strategists, and marketers. We help companies scale to maximum their true potential by exploring DTC solutions best suit for their stage of business. Founded in 2022, our collection of fast paced team members is becoming filled with high priority work, which is where you come in!



What this position is responsible for:

We’re looking for a highly organized and proactive UGC & Project Manager to oversee creator relationships and manage the operational flow of UGC campaigns. This role plays a critical part in ensuring that creator partnerships, campaign deliverables, and internal collaboration run smoothly from start to finish. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced digital marketing environment, is detail-oriented, and can confidently coordinate between creators, internal teams, and clients to ensure campaigns are executed at a high standard.



Requirements/Experience:

- 1–3+ years of experience in UGC management, influencer marketing, social media marketing, or digital marketing operations



- Experience sourcing, recruiting, and managing UGC creators or influencers across platforms such as TikTok and Instagram



- Strong project management and organizational skills, with the ability to manage multiple campaigns simultaneously



- Excellent communication and negotiation skills when working with creators and coordinating with internal teams



- Ability to manage timelines, deliverables, and campaign documentation with a high level of attention to detail



- Familiarity with social media trends, creator ecosystems, and UGC-style content



- Experience reviewing content and ensuring it follows brand guidelines, scripts, and campaign briefs



- Proficiency with project management tools, spreadsheets, and communication platforms (e.g., Google Sheets, Notion, Slack, Trello, etc.)



- Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to identify risks, delays, or bottlenecks early



- Self-starter mindset with the ability to work independently in a remote environment



Roles & Responsibilities for this position:



UGC Management



- Source and recruit high-quality UGC creators across platforms such as TikTok, Instagram, and other relevant social media channels to support ongoing campaigns.



- Build, maintain, and continuously grow a reliable roster of creators, ensuring access to talent that aligns with brand positioning and campaign goals.



- Conduct creator outreach and relationship management, including communication, negotiation of deliverables, and maintaining professional partnerships.



- Distribute campaign briefs, scripts, and brand guidelines to creators, ensuring all expectations and creative requirements are clearly communicated.



- Review and evaluate creator submissions to ensure content meets campaign standards before forwarding for internal or client approval.



- Track and document creator performance, reliability, and content quality to inform future collaborations.



- Maintain and organize creator databases, ensuring accurate records of contact details, past performance, and campaign participation.



Project Management



- Coordinate campaign timelines and deliverables between creators, internal team members, and clients to ensure smooth campaign execution.



- Monitor campaign schedules to ensure all deliverables are completed on time and meet required deadlines.



- Organize and maintain campaign assets and documentation, including briefs, scripts, and project files.



- Track overall project progress, proactively identifying potential delays, bottlenecks, or issues that may impact timelines.



- Communicate updates across teams to maintain alignment and ensure all stakeholders are informed throughout the campaign lifecycle.



- Support the overall campaign workflow by ensuring tasks, deadlines, and responsibilities are clearly defined and executed.



Apply today to join our team!



Notes:



Candidates must be available to work Central Standard Time (CST) business hours.

Schedule: Full-time

Target Start Date: ASAP

title: Full-Time Technical Vector Production Artist (Prepress & SVG Cleanup)
description:
Compensation: $550 – $700 USD per month (depending on speed and technical accuracy)

Schedule: Full-Time (40 hours/week). Long-term role.

Time Zone: Monday–Friday. This work will provide flexibility to work primarily during the day in your local time zone. 



About Us & The Role:

We are a U.S.-based ecommerce company that builds online apparel and merchandise collections for sports teams and community organizations. We are experiencing rapid growth and are building a high-volume production engine.



We are looking for a dedicated Technical Production Artist to join our team full-time. In this role, you will report directly to our Operations Lead, who manages the daily queue.



This is NOT a creative branding role. We do NOT want original logo designs from scratch. We want a technical artist who excels at adapting and simplifying existing artwork to meet strict manufacturing constraints. If you enjoy subtractive problem-solving, path hygiene, and making messy files perfectly clean for print and embroidery, this is the perfect stable, long-term job for you.



What You’ll Do (Daily Workflow):



Vector Hygiene: Receive "messy" auto-generated SVGs from our dashboard and clean them up (remove background artifacts, repair jagged edges, restore missing outlines).



Node Reduction: Simplify paths to the absolute minimum number of anchor points required without losing visual accuracy to the original file.



Vector Simplification (Embroidery Prep): You will need strong visual judgment to take complex, highly detailed logos and simplify them for embroidery. This means knowing how to merge complex gradients into flat colors, thicken thin lines, and delete tiny elements without losing the original identity and soul of the customer's logo. This is subtractive production work, not original concept design.



Color Correction: Ensure colors perfectly match the original customer-submitted reference image and snap to our approved 16-color thread palette when required.



System Integrity: Follow strict layer-naming conventions, export rules, and upload final production-ready files back to our custom dashboard.



Requirements & Hard Skills:



Adobe Illustrator Expert: You must know the Pen Tool, Pathfinder, and Outline Mode (Ctrl+Y / Cmd+Y) perfectly.



Technical Mindset: Previous experience in Prepress, Desktop Publishing (DTP), Vector Tracing, or Embroidery Digitization is highly preferred.



Process-Oriented: You must be comfortable following a strict standard operating procedure (SOP) and taking direct feedback from an Operations Lead without taking it personally. Our Operations lead will also be based in the Phillipines.



Infrastructure: You MUST have a high-speed, reliable internet connection AND a documented power backup solution (UPS, portable power station, or generator) to ensure work continues during local brownouts.



Soft Skills:



Highly Detail-Oriented: You notice a single stray pixel, an unjoined path, or a color mismatch instantly.



Fast but Careful: You thrive in a queue-based environment where volume matters, but you balance accuracy with speed.



Reliable Communicator: Strong written English to communicate clearly with the Operations Lead.



How to Apply:

Please begin your application message with the words: "Clean Paths" so we know you read this entire post. Applications without this will be immediately archived.



Please provide:



A brief introduction highlighting your experience with Prepress, DTP, vector simplification, or high-volume technical production work.



A link to your portfolio OR screenshots of your past vector cleanup work shown specifically in "Outline Mode" so we can evaluate your path structure.



Confirmation of your current internet speeds and your specific power backup solution.



Short answers to these two questions:



A. If a logo file has 2,000 anchor points but looks "fine" visually on the screen, why do you still need to clean and reduce the nodes for production?



B. Are you comfortable in a long-term role where your primary focus is technical cleanup and the subtractive simplification of existing artwork, rather than creating original concepts from scratch?

-Write clear, engaging exercise instructions that guide learners step-by-step

-Develop entirely new courses in emerging security domains (AI Security, Cloud Native

Security, etc.)

-Create documentation, guides, and reference materials that learners will actually use

-Build vulnerable applications and scenarios using our open source projects

Research & Innovation

-Stay curious - constantly explore new security tools, techniques, and vulnerabilities

-Experiment with different approaches to teaching complex security concepts

-Test and validate new security tools to see if they're worth including in our training

-Read security research papers and figure out how to turn them into practical exercises

-Contribute innovative ideas to our open source security projects

-Maintain & Improve Existing Content

-Fix exercises when tools get updated (things break, it happens)

-Modernize labs with newer versions of tools and technologies

-Improve exercises based on student feedback and instructor insights

-Troubleshoot technical issues in training environments

What You Need to Have

Must have:



-Love for writing - you enjoy creating technical content and explaining complex things

simply

-Natural curiosity - you're the type who sees a new security tool and immediately wants to

test it

-Hands-on application security experience - you've found and exploited vulnerabilities

-Strong programming skills (Python, Java, JavaScript) - you can build vulnerable apps

from scratch

-Experience with security tools: SAST/DAST scanners, OWASP ZAP, Burp Suite,

SonarQube, Snyk, etc.

-DevSecOps practical knowledge - CI/CD pipelines, containers, cloud security

-Understanding of OWASP Top 10 and common vulnerability patterns

-Self-motivated researcher who doesn't need hand-holding

Nice to Have:

-You've written technical blog posts, articles, or documentation before

-Created training materials, labs, or exercises (in any domain)

-Contributed to open source projects

-Security certifications (CEH, OSCP, or others)

-Experience teaching or presenting technical topics

-Taken our courses or similar hands-on security training

About You

You're someone who:

-Gets genuinely excited about discovering new vulnerabilities and security techniques

-Enjoys the challenge of explaining technical concepts in simple terms

-Loves spending time researching and experimenting with new tools

-Takes pride in creating content that helps others learn

-Can work independently and manage your own research and content creation timeline

-Doesn't mind the iterative process of writing, testing, getting feedback, and improving

Why This Role is Special

Your exercises will be used by thousands of security professionals worldwide

You'll have creative freedom to research and build what you think is important

You'll shape the future of practical security education

Work with cutting-edge security tools and techniques daily

Professional development budget for certifications, conferences, and tools



Join a passionate team that values education and innovation

title: Animated Futuristic Props for Unreal
description:
I’m building a real-time scene in Unreal Engine and need a skilled 3D artist to supply a library of animated, futuristic props. The project covers both simple set-dress items and intricate hero pieces, but it is strictly props—no characters or full environments. Everything must import cleanly into Unreal with materials that work out of the box.



The job involves modelling, UV unwrapping, PBR texturing, light rigging where required, and creating short, loopable animations (think moving parts, opening panels, subtle mechanical motion). Performance matters, so sensible poly counts and LODs are expected.



Deliverables

• Game-ready files

• 2K or 4K PBR texture sets (BaseColor, Metallic, Roughness, Normal, AO)

• Unreal Engine assets or a sample project showing materials and animations hooked up

• Quick viewport/video preview demonstrating each prop’s animation



Acceptance criteria

• Zero import or shader errors in the latest Unreal Engine version

• Animation loops play seamlessly with root motion locked as needed



If this aligns with your skill set and you’re comfortable pushing a sleek, sci-fi aesthetic, let’s talk timing and milestones so I can slot the assets straight into production.



Please note that if you can make whole level design, the need could evolve to a full project with you.

title: Bookkeeper & Payroll Specialist
description:
We are looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented Bookkeeper & Payroll Specialist to support the accounting operations of multiple related US entities.



This is an ongoing role for someone who can keep our books clean, payroll accurate, reconciliations tight, and reporting consistent.



Important:

This is not a CFO, CRO, or strategy role. If you can develop into that then great.

We need someone strong in bookkeeping, payroll, month-end close, and financial organization.



About Us:

We are a multi-entity product-based business with operations across manufacturing, wholesale, and e-commerce. We need a dependable finance operator who can bring consistency, accuracy, and order to our books.



Responsibilities:

- Maintain accurate financial records for multiple entities in QuickBooks Online

- Record and classify transactions, including accounts payable, accounts receivable, and journal entries

- Prepare and post adjusting journal entries as needed

- Perform monthly bank and credit card reconciliations

- Support month-end close and maintain clean supporting documentation

- Process payroll through Paragon

- Maintain payroll records and employee documentation

- Coordinate payroll changes, updates, and reporting

- Prepare simple recurring reports for management (cash, AP/AR aging, reconciliation status, monthly P&L by entity)

- Help standardize bookkeeping workflows, close checklists, and documentation

- Flag discrepancies, missing information, unusual activity, or process issues early

- Work closely with ownership and internal team members to keep finance operations organized



Must-Have Qualifications:

- 3+ years of bookkeeping or accounting experience

- Strong working knowledge of QuickBooks Online

- Experience supporting multiple entities or business units

- Experience with bank and credit card reconciliations

- Experience preparing adjusting journal entries

- Payroll processing experience

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

- Strong English communication

- Ability to work independently and follow through without constant supervision



Preferred Qualifications:

- Experience with Paragon payroll or similar US payroll systems

- Experience with product-based, inventory-based, manufacturing, wholesale, or e-commerce businesses

- Experience supporting small to mid-size US businesses

- Strong Excel or Google Sheets skills

- Understanding of US accounting basics / GAAP

- Experience cleaning up messy books and building repeatable monthly close processes



What Success Looks Like:

First 30 days:

- Review current bookkeeping setup across entities

- Reconcile priority accounts

- Identify cleanup gaps and reporting inconsistencies

- Learn payroll workflow and create a monthly close checklist



First 60 days:

- Own a stable monthly bookkeeping rhythm

- Deliver accurate reconciliations and payroll support

- Improve documentation and supporting records

- Surface any cleanup or system issues clearly



First 90 days:

- Close books consistently each month

- Provide simple, reliable management reporting

- Help create a more organized finance process across entities



Availability:

- Must be available for some overlap with US Central Time (CST)

- Ongoing part-time role to start, with potential to grow based on performance



To Apply:

Please answer the screening questions below and start your proposal with:

“ledger first”



We are looking for someone dependable, process-minded, and accurate not just someone who can data-enter transactions.

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 2a
description:

/cro-shopify-web-developer/



CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

title: WordPress Systems Developer / Automation Specialist (Project + Monthly Retainer)
description:
We are a U.S.-based company building a property data and analytics platform for real estate professionals.

We currently have an early version of the platform built on WordPress with dynamic database tools and automations.

We are looking for a high-level technical builder to help restructure, improve, and maintain the platform.

This role will begin as a project-based rebuild, followed by ongoing monthly maintenance and feature development.

You will work directly with the founder to improve system architecture, build automations, and support future feature development.

This is a long-term opportunity for the right person.

Project Scope (Initial Work)

The first phase of this role will focus on improving or rebuilding portions of the platform.

Responsibilities may include:

• improving database structure

• organizing dynamic data fields

• improving system performance

• troubleshooting existing functionality

• improving automation workflows

• preparing the platform for future features

Ongoing Responsibilities

After the initial project is completed, the role will transition into ongoing maintenance and improvements.

This may include:

• maintaining the WordPress platform

• managing dynamic database structures

• building or maintaining automations

• troubleshooting issues

• testing new features before release

• documenting system workflows

Expected workload after launch:

Approximately 10–20 hours per month.

Required Skills

• Strong WordPress development experience

• Experience with dynamic database content

(JetEngine, Crocoblock, ACF, or similar tools)

• Experience with automation platforms

(GHL)

• Understanding of API integrations

• Strong problem-solving ability

• Excellent written English

• Ability to work independently



Work Schedule

Flexible schedule.

Some availability during U.S. Eastern Time is helpful for communication.



Why This Role Is Unique



You will be working directly with the founder to help build a software platform from the ground up.

This is not a typical VA role. You will help shape the technical structure and future development of the platform.

This is a long-term opportunity for someone who enjoys building systems and improving software platforms.



How to Apply

Please include:

A short introduction about yourself

Examples of platforms or systems you have built

Your experience with WordPress database tools (JetEngine, ACF, etc.)

Your experience with automation platforms (GHL)

To confirm you read the entire job post, please begin your application with the phrase:

“Systems Builder.”

About Bluestage



Bluestage stays true to its roots. Bluestage exists to challenge the status quo by creating digital experiences that feel as premium as the real world, leaving customers happier than when they started. Through our network, we spotlight talent, spark creativity, and give back through access, tickets, and moments worth remembering.



Bluestage helps businesses grow through digital infrastructure—websites, CRM systems, marketing automation, and lead generation. Our platform, BluestageAI, powers lead management, automation, and customer communication for clients across industries including sports, events, automotive, construction, and local service businesses.







Position Summary



Bluestage is seeking a CRM Specialist with experience in GoHighLevel to manage and optimize CRM systems for both internal projects and client accounts.



This role focuses on building automation workflows, managing lead pipelines, implementing marketing funnels, and improving client conversion systems. The CRM Specialist will ensure leads are captured, tracked, and nurtured through automated communication systems that help businesses convert more prospects into customers.



This is a systems-focused role where organization, automation thinking, and attention to detail are critical.



?



Key Responsibilities



CRM Management

 • Build and manage CRM pipelines inside GoHighLevel

 • Configure lead stages, opportunity tracking, and contact management

 • Ensure accurate tracking of leads, clients, and marketing sources



Marketing Automation

 • Build automated workflows for SMS,
, and AI voice follow-ups

 • Implement automated lead nurturing campaigns

 • Design trigger-based automation sequences to improve conversions



Funnels & Forms

 • Build landing pages and lead funnels inside GoHighLevel

 • Configure forms, surveys, calendars, and lead capture systems

 • Connect funnels with automation workflows and pipelines



Client Implementation

 • Onboard new client accounts into BluestageAI CRM

 • Configure account settings, integrations, and automation systems

 • Train clients on how to use the CRM platform effectively



Integrations & Tracking

 • Connect third-party tools and APIs when needed

 • Implement UTM tracking and campaign attribution

 • Ensure leads from websites, ads, and forms sync properly into the CRM



Optimization

 • Monitor pipeline performance and lead conversion rates

 • Identify automation improvements to increase efficiency

 • Troubleshoot CRM issues, broken automations, or workflow conflicts







Required Qualifications

 • Experience working with GoHighLevel CRM

 • Understanding of marketing automation systems

 • Experience building funnels, pipelines, and workflows

 • Strong organizational and systems-thinking skills

 • Ability to manage multiple CRM accounts simultaneously

 • Clear communication and ability to explain systems to non-technical clients







Preferred Qualifications

 • Experience working with marketing agencies

 • Familiarity with SMS/email marketing automation

 • Knowledge of lead generation systems and conversion funnels

 • Experience with Zapier, API integrations, or webhooks

 • Understanding of Google Analytics, UTM tracking, or campaign attribution

 • Basic understanding of SEO and digital marketing







What Success Looks Like (KPIs)

 • CRM systems deployed and functioning without errors

 • Lead automation workflows actively nurturing prospects

 • Improved lead-to-customer conversion rates for clients

 • Accurate tracking of lead sources and campaign performance

 • Clean CRM data with organized pipelines and communication logs







What You Get

 • Work inside a fast-growing marketing and technology company

 • Exposure to real client growth systems and automation infrastructure

 • Opportunity to work with BluestageAI CRM platform

 • Career growth into CRM Architect, Automation Manager, or Operations Lead

title: Paid Ads Specialist (Night Shift – PH Time)
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines)

Schedule: Monday–Thursday | 6:00 AM–6:00 PM PST U.S time zone (Night shift PH time)

Compensation: $1,800 USD/month

Holidays: Paid U.S. holidays

Employment Type: Full-time



How to Apply

Video resume submission is required.

Your video should:

Be 2–4 minutes

Introduce yourself and your paid ads experience

Share platforms managed and real results you’ve driven

Be recorded in clear, fluent English

Applications without a video resume will not be reviewed.



The Role (What You’ll Actually Be Doing)



We’re hiring a Paid Ads Specialist who understands that ads don’t exist to look pretty—they exist to drive real results. You’ll manage paid advertising for multiple clients, continuously optimize performance, and clearly communicate what’s working, what’s not, and what’s next.



This is a collaborative role. You’ll work closely with strategists, marketers, and account managers. If you vanish after launch or hate accountability, this won’t be a fit.



Platforms You’ll Manage



Google Display Ads

Google Search (bonus)

 & Instagram Ads

LinkedIn Ads

Bing Ads

Additional platforms as needed



Core Responsibilities



Build, launch, and manage paid ad campaigns across multiple platforms

Write ad copy and coordinate creative testing

Manage and optimize campaigns daily for conversions, CPL, and ROAS

Manage and pace budgets responsibly

Run A/B tests on ads, audiences, and placements

Deliver clear weekly performance reports (results, insights, next steps)

Maintain and update Excel spreadsheets and reporting trackers

Collaborate with the team to align ads with client goals and funnel strategy

Support additional tasks that help the team operate efficiently



Mandatory Requirements (Non-Negotiable)



Strong spoken and written English (client-facing communication required)

Proven experience managing paid ads for multiple clients or brands

Ability to clearly explain performance, trends, and recommendations

Highly organized with strong attention to detail

Comfortable working night shift PH time aligned with U.S. hours

Reliable internet and professional remote work setup



Bonuses & Performance Incentives

This role includes performance-based bonuses tied to outcomes—not vanity metrics.



Client Renewal Bonuses

Bonuses awarded when clients you support renew their services based on campaign performance and satisfaction

Designed to reward long-term thinking, consistency, and quality execution



Real Lead Generation Bonuses



Bonuses paid for legitimate, qualified leads generated from your campaigns

Leads must be real businesses with real contact information

No spam, no fake
s, no internal test submissions

Lead quality is verified by the sales team before bonuses are approved



(If it wouldn’t pass a real sales conversation, it doesn’t count.)





B2B or lead generation experience



Agency experience managing multiple accounts



Understanding of funnels, attribution, and conversion tracking



Landing page and CRO familiarity



Why This Role Is Worth It



4-day workweek (Monday–Thursday)



Paid U.S. holidays



Clear expectations and structured workflows



Bonuses tied to actual business impact



Opportunity to grow as budgets, platforms, and responsibilities expand



A team that values execution, transparency, and results



How to Apply

Video resume submission is required.



Your video should:

Be 2–4 minutes

Introduce yourself and your paid ads experience

Share platforms managed and real results you’ve driven

Be recorded in clear, fluent English

Applications without a video resume will not be reviewed.

title: Real Estate Financial Analyst
description:
Job description

We are currently seeking an experienced Financial Analyst to assist in underwriting and all stages of our ongoing multifamily development projects. 



As part of the interview process applicant will be asked to conduct and lead a live, walk-through demonstration of a mixed use complex development model with multi tier capital sources and return distribution waterfalls to demonstrate applicant's aptitude and knowledge of financial modeling in a mixed use context. 



The applicant will work closely with senior leadership and assist in the investment decisions and long-term strategy of the company. 



Verifiable actual work in experience in creating and maintaining complex mixed-use new development models is essential. Minimum 5 years of current work experience. 



Responsibilities 

· Support the development and maintenance of financial models for development projects.

· Evaluate deal structures, capital stacks, and return metrics (IRR, equity multiples, etc.).

· Assist in investment underwriting and build financial models of ground-up developments highlighting cash flow, IRRs and other return metrics, hurdles and waterfalls, LP & GP positions and senior and mezzanine debt analysis.

· Perform sensitivity analysis and assist in asset hold/sell strategy recommendations and provide analysis for various capital structures.

· Prepare project status reports showing budget variance, equity spent and remaining loan for each asset.

· Working with management to understand go-forward budgets based on actuals, comparing that with our original underwriting.

· Optimize capital stack through sensitivity of various capital and interest rate funding options. 

· Assist with preparing financing packages for lenders, investors, and joint venture partners.

· Conduct market research to verify rent, expense, and absorption assumptions.

· Analyze rental trends and data from broker outreach and industry resources.

· Contribute to evaluating investment strategies, including cash flow projections, returns, etc.

· Participate in financial and physical due diligence for investment opportunities.

· Assist in the review and coordination of project entitlement work.

· Assist in the review of operating budgets and financial reporting. 

· Compile quarterly financial reporting for active investments. Other tasks as assigned.



Qualifications

· Bachelor's degree in Finance, Real Estate, Economics, or a related field.

· Minimum 5 years of experience as a financial analyst of new development projects.

· Strong skills in Microsoft Excel modeling and analytical functions required.

· Strong quantitative, analytical, and organizational skills. Strong time management skills.

· Excellent written and verbal communication skills. Ability to be an independent worker.

· Demonstrated ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

· Strong attention to detail, sound judgment, and a proactive, solution-oriented approach.

· Strong research, analytical, and problem solving skills and ability to work independently. 



Responsibilities listed above are not the only ones applicable to the position.

title: UGC Content Coordinator
description:
About the Role



We are a fast-growing global ecommerce brand looking to scale our UGC (User-Generated Content) engine. Great content drives performance for us and we want someone who can consistently discover talented creators, build relationships with them and turn those connections into high-quality content collaborations.

This role is for someone who enjoys researching creators, reaching out to them, building partnerships and managing the collaboration process end to end. From identifying creators to coordinating product shipments and ensuring content is delivered as expected, you will play a key role in helping us scale our content production.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Creator Sourcing 

Identify high-quality UGC creators across various platforms

Research creators whose content style, audience and storytelling align with our brand.

Develop new methods and systems to continuously discover emerging creators.



Creator Outreach & Relationship Building

Reach out to creators and brand ambassadors to explore potential collaborations.

Clearly communicate our brand, our products and the type of content we are looking for.

Provide creators with detailed briefings and clear instructions on content expectations, deliverables, timelines, and usage rights.

Create detailed creator briefings based on campaign objectives and brand requirements.

Work with creators to agree on collaboration terms and conditions.

Ensure all necessary forms and agreements are completed and documented to avoid any future implications.



Campaign Coordination

Arrange and coordinate product shipments so creators have what they need to produce content.

Track shipments and ensure the products are successfully delivered to creators.

Ensure creators fully understand the creative direction and expectations.

Follow up consistently with creators to ensure content is delivered on time and meets quality standards.

Review submitted content and share it with relevant internal tea
mbers for further use and approvals.

Ensure end-to-end completion of creator collaborations, from initial outreach and briefing to content delivery and internal handover.



Process & Organization

Maintain a structured pipeline of creators for ongoing collaborations.

Track outreach, shipments, agreements, and content delivery.

Continuously improve the process for finding creators and managing collaborations efficiently.



What We’re Looking For

Strong communication skills and the confidence to reach out to creators and build relationships.

Highly organized and able to manage multiple creator collaborations at the same time.

Ability to give clear direction while allowing creators creative freedom.

A proactive mindset with the ability to constantly discover new creators.

Ability to ensure end-to-end completion of creator collaborations, from initial outreach and briefing to content delivery and final coordination.



Who This Role Is Not For

Someone who waits for creators to approach them instead of actively sourcing creators.

Someone who struggles with consistent follow-ups and coordination.

Someone uncomfortable with direct communication about expectations and deliverables.

Someone who is not detail-oriented when managing multiple collaborations.



Application Process

To help us understand how you think and communicate, please answer the following:

Which platform do you believe is the best for finding high-quality UGC creators and why?

Write or explain the first message you would send to a creator to start a collaboration with our brand.

title: VA Interior Design Assistant
description:
About Us

We are a dynamic and growing interior design firm looking for a highly organized and proactive Virtual Assistant (VA) to support our design team remotely. This role is perfect for someone with experience in interior design and a passion for supporting creative teams. You’ll work closely with designers to bring their vision to life through 3D modeling, project coordination, and procurement logistics. If you’re a detail-oriented professional who thrives in a fast-paced environment, we want to hear from you!



Key Responsibilities

- 3D Modeling & Rendering: Collaborate with designers to create high-quality 3D models and photorealistic renderings using design tools such as SketchUp, Revit, or similar software.

- Construction & Planning Documentation: Assist in preparing floor plans, elevations, sections, and other technical drawings for design development and construction.

- Materials & Product Research: Research materials, finishes, and furnishings that meet the project’s needs; compile detailed product specifications and comparisons.

- Vendor Communication & Procurement Support: Coordinate with vendors and suppliers to request samples, pricing, and lead times. Help prepare procurement schedules and manage order tracking.

- Project Coordination: Keep digital files organized, maintain project documentation, and ensure designers are updated on outstanding tasks and product delivery timelines.

- Administrative Support: Provide general administrative assistance, including scheduling meetings, updating client presentations, and entering data for project tracking.

Qualifications

- Proven experience in interior design support or a related Virtual Assistant role.

- Proficiency in design software: Revit (Priority), Enscape for SketchUp, Enscape for Rhino, or other rendering software. Familiarity with Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, InDesign) is a plus.

- Strong research, organizational, and multitasking skills.

- Excellent written and verbal communication abilities.

- Self-motivated, dependable, and able to manage tasks independently in a remote setting.

- Must be available to work during PST business hours.

Why Join Us?

- Work with a creative and collaborative design team that values innovation and attention to detail.

- Flexible, remote work environment that promotes work-life balance.

- Opportunity to grow and gain hands-on experience in a fast-paced interior design setting.

Ready to be part of an innovative design team?

If you’re passionate about interior design, tech-savvy, and thrive in a remote role, we’d love to have you onboard. Apply today!

title: Senior Performance Marketing Specialist (Google Ads & Meta Ads)
description:
Senior Performance Marketing Specialist (Google Ads & Meta Ads)



Work Closely With Founder



About the Role



We are a growing digital marketing agency looking for an experienced Performance Marketing Specialist to join our team.



This is a mid–senior level role suited for someone with proven experience in managing and optimising paid media campaigns, while also contributing to overall marketing strategy.



You will work closely with the founder and play an important role in supporting campaign growth and improving performance outcomes for clients.



Role Overview



In this role, you will manage paid media campaigns and contribute to performance-driven strategies across multiple client accounts.



We are looking for someone who is comfortable working independently, making informed decisions, and continuously improving campaign performance.



Key Responsibilities



Manage and optimise Google Ads campaigns (Search, Display, Performance Max)



Manage and optimise Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)



Build and support lead generation funnels



Contribute to campaign strategy based on client goals



Analyse performance and provide data-driven insights



Identify opportunities to improve conversion rates and lead quality



Support scaling of high-performing campaigns



Assist in troubleshooting and improving underperforming campaigns



Collaborate with the founder on growth strategies



What We’re Looking For



We are seeking a proactive and results-oriented marketer who:



Has experience managing Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns



Understands marketing funnels and key performance metrics



Is comfortable managing their workload and priorities



Takes responsibility for campaign performance



Proactively looks for ways to improve results



Is interested in developing further into a leadership or mentoring role over time



Required Skills



Google Ads (Search, Display, Performance Max)



Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)



Lead generation campaigns



Campaign optimisation and scaling



Marketing funnel understanding



Conversion tracking and performance analysis



You should also have a good understanding of how paid traffic connects with landing pages, conversion rates, and lead quality.



Nice to Have



Ecommerce marketing experience



Info product / digital product marketing



Conversion Rate Optimisation (CRO)



Landing page optimisation



Experience with CRM or funnel tools (e.g. GoHighLevel)



Marketing automation



Familiarity with AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, or similar tools



Industries We Work With



We primarily work with service-based businesses, including:



Construction



Home improvement



Solar



Beauty & wellness



Local service providers



Experience supporting lead generation for local businesses is beneficial.



Our Approach



We focus on delivering measurable performance and continuous improvement.



Our team values clear communication, efficiency, and a results-oriented mindset.



Working Hours



Ability to work within or overlap with the Melbourne, Australia timezone (AEST/AEDT)



Availability for regular check-ins and team discussions when required



Why Join Us



Work closely with the founder



Be part of a growing agency environment



Opportunity to contribute to processes and systems



Potential to grow into a more senior or leadership role over time



Next Step



If your experience aligns with this role, you are welcome to share your CV along with a short introduction outlining relevant campaigns you have worked on.



Our team will review applications and reach out to suitable candidates.

title: Digital Ads & Lead Generation Specialist
description:
Digital Ads & Lead Generation Specialist

Full-Time | Remote



About the Role



We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Digital Ads & Lead Generation Specialist to manage and optimize paid advertising campaigns across multiple locations. This role focuses on driving high-quality leads and improving overall conversion performance.



You will be responsible for the full marketing funnel—from campaign setup and execution to tracking, analysis, and ongoing optimization. Collaboration with the internal marketing team is key to ensuring campaigns align with brand messaging and business goals.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys hands-on execution, data-driven decision-making, and continuous performance improvement.



Key Responsibilities

Paid Campaign Management



Plan, launch, and manage campaigns across Google Ads (Search, Local, Performance Max) and Meta Ads



Support additional channels such as TikTok and YouTube when required



Allocate and optimize budgets across multiple locations



Adjust targeting, bidding, and messaging based on performance data



Scale campaigns to increase lead volume and efficiency



Ad Creative & Testing



Develop and optimize ad copy focused on performance



Collaborate with design teams to produce effective creatives



Conduct A/B testing on ad copy, visuals, and audience targeting



Continuously improve CTR and conversion rates



Landing Page Optimization



Support the creation and optimization of landing pages



Test headlines, offers, and calls-to-action to improve conversion rates



Ensure a seamless and user-friendly lead capture experience



Tracking & Reporting



Maintain accurate tracking across ad platforms and CRM systems



Monitor key metrics such as CPL, conversion rates, and ROI



Provide regular performance reports with actionable insights



Identify trends and recommend optimization strategies



Requirements



Proven experience managing paid advertising campaigns on Google and Meta platforms



Strong understanding of lead generation and conversion tracking



Analytical mindset with the ability to optimize campaigns based on data



Ability to manage multiple campaigns and priorities effectively



Strong communication and collaboration skills



Nice to Have



Experience working with multi-location or service-based businesses



Familiarity with CRM systems and marketing automation tools



Experience with landing page or sales funnel optimization



What Success Looks Like



Increased volume of qualified leads across multiple locations



Consistent and optimized cost per lead (CPL)



Improved conversion rates across campaigns



A strong, stable, and scalable lead pipeline

title: Call center agent. Male American accent.
description: We answer phone calls from USA and use AI to research questions customers ask and help guide the customer to answer.  We average 4 calls per hour and pay around 1.25 to 1.75 per call in usd.  Paid once a month.  8 Hour shifts. I need a total of 4 workers.   Must have good internet over 150 mbps and your own laptop with windows 10 or above for the dialer.  Must have good American accent so we can sound like an American.   Many of my workers earn over 50k a month.  There are a LOT of calls but it varies per time of day.   Please let me know your contact so we can call and hear eachother asap.   This is not cold calling. Its all inbound calls and tech support.  Its really helpful if you have experience but I can teach you because its simple.  Must have a quiet work environment and be a Male voice.  This is legit work from home work but I need highly motivated productive workers. You are paid well and per call so that motivates most workers. All calls are monitored.

title: Virtual Sales Representative (Closer)
description:
Virtual Sales Representative (Closer)

Full-Time | Remote (Overseas) | U.S. Hours Required



About Skyline Exteriors

Skyline Exteriors is a high-performance exterior services company based in Chicago, IL. We specialize in:

- Landscaping & property maintenance

- Snow removal services

- Exterior facility management

- Design & build outdoor projects



We operate with a focus on:

- Speed

- Precision

- Clear communication

- High-quality execution

- We are not a low-cost provider.



We position ourselves as a premium, reliable, and professional service company.

As we continue to scale, we are looking for a Virtual Sales Representative (Closer) to take ownership of inbound opportunities and convert them into high-quality, profitable clients.



Position Overview

This is a closing role, not a customer service role.

You will be responsible for:

- Running Scope of Work Meetings with qualified prospects

- Defining and shaping project/service requirements

- Presenting proposals clearly and confidently

- Closing deals across multiple service lines



You will be expected to:

- Control conversations

- Follow structured processes

- Sell value (not price)

- Protect margins



Core Responsibilities

1. Scope of Work Meetings (Primary Responsibility)

Conduct structured Scope of Work Meetings with inbound leads

Identify:

- Property details

- Service requirements

- Budget expectations

- Timeline

Clearly define:

- Scope of work

- What is included vs excluded

- Next steps

- Set the foundation for accurate proposals and successful execution



2. Sales & Closing

Present proposals for:

- Maintenance contracts

- Snow removal agreements

- Design & build projects

- One-off services

- Walk clients through:

- Scope

- Pricing

- Timeline

- Handle objections with confidence

- Close deals while maintaining Skyline’s premium positioning

- Avoid unnecessary discounting



3. Pipeline Management

- Manage all leads within CRM systems

- Track opportunities through stages:

     - New ? Qualified ? Proposal ? Closed

- Maintain fast response times

- Ensure no qualified lead is lost due to poor follow-up

- Keep detailed notes from every interaction



4. Follow-Up & Deal Advancement

- Execute structured follow-up sequences

- Re-engage stalled deals

- Maintain consistent communication

- Ensure all opportunities are properly closed (won or lost with reason)



5. Service Knowledge

Develop a strong understanding of:

- Landscaping & maintenance services

- Snow removal operations

- Design/build services

- Communicate services clearly and professionally to clients



6. Client Experience

- Deliver a high-end, professional experience from first contact to close

- Communicate clearly and promptly

- Set accurate expectations — no overpromising

- Build trust while maintaining authority



7. Internal Coordination

Work closely with:

- Estimators

- Account Managers

- Operations

- Ensure all scope details are accurate before closing

- Provide structured handoff notes after each deal



8. CRM & Systems Discipline

Log all Scope of Work Meetings and communications

Maintain clean, organized CRM records

Track:

- Lead source

- Deal stage

- Notes and next steps

- Follow all internal sales SOPs



Requirements

Must-Have

- Minimum 2+ years of closing experience (not appointment setting or support)

- Strong English communication (written and verbal)

- Experience selling services (home services, construction, SaaS, or similar)

- Ability to lead structured calls and control conversations

- Strong follow-up and organizational skills

- Ability to work U.S. business hours (CST overlap required)

- Reliable internet and professional work environment



Preferred

Experience in:

- Landscaping

- Construction

- Property services

- Familiarity with CRM systems (Jobber, HubSpot, etc.)

- Experience selling higher-ticket services



Who This Role Is For

You will succeed if you:

- Are a closer, not an order taker

- Can confidently lead conversations

- Sell value instead of competing on price

- Follow structured processes

- Take ownership of your pipeline and results



Who This Role Is NOT For

- Entry-level VAs

- Appointment setters

- People who avoid objections

- Candidates who rely purely on scripts

- Anyone who needs constant supervision



Compensation Plan

Base Salary

$500 – $800/month USD (based on experience)

Commission Structure

- Earn 3% – 6% commission on all closed deals

Performance Tiers

Increased commission percentages based on monthly performance:

- $50K+ closed ? higher tier

- $100K+ closed ? top tier

Additional Incentives

Performance bonuses based on:

- Close rate

- Consistency

- Pipeline management



Growth opportunities into:

Senior Sales

Sales Manager

Revenue leadership roles



Earning Potential

Average performers: $2,000 – $4,000/month

Top performers: $5,000+/month



Work Schedule

Full-time (40 hours/week)

Must be available during U.S. business hours

Flexibility required during peak seasons



How to Apply (Read Carefully)

We are selective. Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.

1. Resume

Submit your most recent resume highlighting your closing experience.



2. Loom Video (Required)

Record a 3–5 minute Loom video covering:

Your relevant work experience

Why you believe you would be a strong fit for this position

What you enjoy doing outside of work

Important:

Speak clearly and confidently

Do not read from a script

Keep your answers structured and concise

Name your video:

FirstName_LastName_Skyline_Sales



3. Written Response

Answer the following:

“You just completed a Scope of Work Meeting. The client says your price is higher than competitors. What do you say next?”



4. Subject Line (Mandatory)

Use:

Skyline Sales Application – [Your Name]

Applications without this subject line will be automatically disqualified.



5. Availability Confirmation

Confirm:

You can work U.S. business hours

You are available full-time

Final Note

We are not looking for average.

We are looking for someone who:

Takes ownership

Communicates clearly

Closes consistently

Operates with discipline

This role directly impacts Skyline’s growth.

We are looking for someone ready to perform at a high level.

title: Website/Landing Page/Funnel Graphic Designer
description:
We are Singapore’s fastest growing performance marketing agency seeking

Website/Graphic Designer

(1 full-time, remote position available)



We are Singapore’s fastest-growing performance marketing agency helping speakers, coaches, and service-based businesses build and scale million-dollar offers through paid ads and sales systems.



We are looking for a high-performance Website / Funnel Graphic Designer who understands conversion-driven design, mobile-first layouts, and AI-powered design workflows.



This is not a typical graphic design role.



You will be responsible for creating designs that directly impact revenue, including landing pages, ad creatives, webinar slides, and funnel assets.



You will work closely with our media buyers, copywriters, and funnel builders to produce high-converting marketing assets.



?



Who This Role Is For



You are someone who:

	•	Designs clean, modern, conversion-focused layouts

	•	Understands how design affects marketing performance

	•	Is obsessed with spacing, alignment, and visual hierarchy

	•	Thinks mobile-first

	•	Uses AI tools to speed up and improve design workflows

	•	Can execute quickly without sacrificing quality



If you only design pretty graphics but do not understand marketing, this role will not be a good fit.



?



What You Will Be Designing



You will create graphics and layouts for:



•?  ?Landing pages and funnels

•?  ?Static ad creatives for paid ads

•?  ?Webinar and training slides

•?  ?Membership site assets

•?  ?Marketing posters and event materials

•?  ?Funnel sections and conversion elements



Your designs must be clean, persuasive, and optimized for conversion.



?



Core Responsibilities



Design high-converting landing page layouts using strong visual hierarchy.



Create high-performing ad creatives for paid advertising campaigns.



Design webinar and training slides that improve speaker credibility and student engagement.



Collaborate with copywriters and media buyers to translate messaging into visual layouts.



Ensure all landing pages are modern, clean, and mobile responsive.



Support A/B testing of visual elements to improve performance.



Apply UX and conversion best practices in all marketing designs.



Organize and maintain structured design systems and reusable templates.



Document repeatable processes into internal design SOPs.



Stay updated with design trends, AI tools, and marketing creative strategies.



?



Required Skills (Must Have)



Modern Conversion Design



You must understand:

	•	Visual hierarchy

	•	Conversion-focused layouts

	•	CTA placement

	•	Color psychology

	•	Typography systems



Mobile-Responsive Design (Mandatory)



All designs must be mobile optimized.



You must understand:

	•	Mobile spacing

	•	Readable font sizes

	•	Button tap areas

	•	Layout stacking

	•	Mobile-first UX



If you do not design mobile-first, this role will not be suitable.



?



AI Design Tools (Mandatory)



You must have experience using AI tools to accelerate design workflows, including tools such as:

	•	Lovable

	•	Nano Banana

	•	Gemini

	•	AI design assistants or generators



We expect designers to use AI as leverage, not replacement.



?



Tools



You must be comfortable working with:



•?  ?Figma

•?  ?Canva

•?  ?GoHighLevel (GHL)

•?  ?Photoshop or similar design tools



?



Experience Required



You must have experience designing for:



•?  ?Landing pages

•?  ?Marketing funnels

•?  ?Paid ads

•?  ?Webinar slides

•?  ?Marketing campaigns



Experience in performance marketing or funnel design is highly preferred.



?



Personal Traits



We are looking for someone who is:



•?  ?Highly detail-oriented

•?  ?Able to execute fast under deadlines

•?  ?Comfortable working remotely and independently

•?  ?Able to handle multiple projects simultaneously

•?  ?Always learning new tools, especially AI tools



?



This Role Is NOT For You If



•?  ?You only design social media graphics

•?  ?You don’t understand marketing funnels

•?  ?You struggle with mobile design

•?  ?You cannot work independently

•?  ?You avoid learning new tools



?



Application Process



To be considered for this role, applicants will go through:



1?? Portfolio review

2?? Timed design test (2 hours)

3?? Final interview



Only candidates who demonstrate speed, accuracy, and attention to detail will proceed.



?



Why Join Us



You will work alongside a high-performance marketing team building scalable businesses for experts and entrepreneurs.



You will gain exposure to:



•?  ?High-level funnel strategy

•?  ?Conversion optimization

•?  ?Paid advertising creative strategy

•?  ?AI-powered marketing workflows



If you are keen to work with our driven, collaborative and value-creating team, please complete the form below for consideration, and you will be notified once your application has been processed.

title: Remote Graphic & Web Designer (Adobe Suite & Elementor)
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled Web Designer with a strong foundation in graphic design to join our remote team. This role requires advanced visual design expertise, exceptional attention to detail, and hands-on experience creating and maintaining websites in WordPress using Elementor. The ideal candidate is first and foremost a designer who understands branding, layout, typography, and visual storytelling, and can translate those skills into high-performing, well-structured websites.



This position is not for developers who only assemble templates. You must be able to design original visual systems, create polished graphic materials, and execute complete websites that reflect each client’s identity and goals.



Key Responsibilities:

- Design custom, brand-aligned websites in WordPress using Elementor, with a strong emphasis on visual hierarchy, spacing, typography, and responsiveness.

- Create high-quality graphic materials for digital use, including website visuals, banners, social media graphics, brand identity, and photo editing is a plus.

- Use Adobe Creative Suite at an advanced level to design original layouts and visual elements that integrate seamlessly into web builds.

- Maintain and update existing websites, including design refinements, layout adjustments, blog posts, city pages, and client-requested changes.

- Review and optimize website pages for visual consistency, usability, clarity, and SEO-friendly structure.

- Manage projects from concept through launch, ensuring design accuracy, consistency, and on-time delivery.

- Collaborate with the Art Director and internal team, proactively contributing design ideas and improvements.



Qualifications:

3+ years of professional experience designing and building websites in WordPress.

Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite, including Photoshop & Illustrator.

Strong eye for detail with proven ability to design polished, original graphic materials.

Ability to design and build complete websites from scratch using Elementor.

Highly organized and capable of managing multiple projects simultaneously.



A portfolio is required. DO NOT APPLY IF YOU CANNOT PROVIDE A PORTFOLIO.



Nice-to-Have Skills:

Experience with Slack and Asana.

Additional language skills are a plus.



Fluent or native-level English proficiency is required.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
We are Singapore’s fastest growing performance marketing agency seeking

Social Media Manager

(1 full-time, remote position available)



You are a creative, strategic, and highly organized content creator who lives and breathes social media. You don’t just post for the sake of it — you understand the psychology of scroll-stopping content, the power of storytelling, and how to turn followers into fans, and fans into clients. You are data-driven, always testing what works, and you're obsessed with content that not only looks good — but converts.



We are Singapore’s fastest growing performance marketing agency that specialises in helping speakers, coaches, and service-based businesses build and scale million dollar offers through paid ads, funnels, and high-level mentorship.



We are seeking a Social Media Manager to drive the growth of our online presence, build our personal and agency brand, and turn our content into a client acquisition machine. You’ll work closely with our copywriters, media team, and CEO to plan, create, and publish compelling content across multiple platforms.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

Create high-converting content (reels, carousels, captions, short-form videos) using existing video footage, testimonials, and UGC

Repurpose long-form content (e.g. webinars, podcast, masterclasses) into short-form assets

Work with designers, editors, and writers to ensure quality output that aligns with our brand voice

Analyze performance data and iterate content based on insights and platform best practices



BRAND BUILDING & ENGAGEMENT

Grow and maintain a strong online presence for our CEO, COO and agency across all major platforms

Manage community engagement (responding to comments, DMs, and nurturing prospects)

Research trends, hooks, and viral formats to keep our content fresh and attention-grabbing

Create and maintain a swipe file of best-performing social content across industries



CAMPAIGN SUPPORT & LAUNCHES

Collaborate with our paid ads and funnel team to align organic content with launches and ongoing campaigns

Support
, ad, and launch strategies with complementary organic content

Track performance of content leading to conversions, leads, and webinar sign-ups

Brainstorm new content angles with the CEO and team for upcoming campaigns



REQUIREMENTS:

Strong command of English writing and storytelling (a must)

Proven experience managing social media for personal brands or agencies

A strong eye for design, layout, and visual storytelling (experience with Canva or Adobe tools is a plus)

Able to work independently and manage your own content calendar

Familiarity with marketing, sales psychology, and funnel strategy is preferred

Experience with Reels/TikTok editing, YouTube Shorts, or repurposing video content is a huge bonus

Obsessive about deadlines, details, and making things look damn good

Comfortable receiving feedback and iterating quickly



Bonus:

Experience working in the digital marketing, coaching, or SaaS space

Familiarity with GoHighLevel, Asana, Google Drive, or content scheduling tools





If you’re excited about building a social media machine that gets real business results and want to work with a high-performing, collaborative, and fun team — we’d love to hear from you.

Please complete the form below for consideration, and you will be notified once your application has been processed:

title: Client Success Manager
description:
We are Singapore’s fastest growing performance marketing agency seeking

Client Success Manager

(1 full-time, remote position available)



Do you love helping people win?



If yes — we want to hear from you.



Who We AreYou are a highly driven, proactive, and detail-oriented team player who thrives on helping others succeed. You take ownership of client results, love systems and checklists, and are confident in communicating with people from all walks of life. You’re resourceful, solution-oriented, and constantly looking for ways to improve processes, client outcomes, and team performance.

We are Singapore’s fastest growing performance marketing agency that specialises in helping speakers, coaches and service-based businesses build and scale million dollar offers through paid ads, funnels, and high-level mentorship.

We are seeking a Success Manager to support and manage our software clients (Funnel Creation Kit), mentorship students, and high-touch private clients — ensuring they receive world-class support, get results fast, and stay engaged throughout their journey with us.



RESPONSIBILITIES:



CLIENT SUCCESS & STRATEGY

Onboard new software users, mentees, and private clients with clarity and care

Track key client metrics, milestones, and progress

Proactively follow up with clients to prevent drop-off and unblock bottlenecks

Host check-in calls, onboarding sessions, or group accountability calls

Support coaching calls (e.g. note-taking, follow-up summaries, reminders)

Create and update success playbooks, SOPs, and client templates

Analyze client data and suggest improvements to boost retention and results

Track KPIs across all programs to ensure consistent client success





EVENT SOURCING & MANAGEMENT

Source venues and vendors for both local and overseas events

Negotiate event deals and manage budgets

Handle logistics, registration, and client communication pre- and post-event

Liaise with internal teams to ensure events are smooth, strategic, and impactful

Attend events when required to support clients and internal teams onsite





RELATIONSHIPS & COMMUNITY

Build strong relationships with clients—be their go-to person and biggest cheerleader

Engage clients inside our online communities and programs

Encourage accountability, progress sharing, and peer support





REQUIREMENTS:

Strong English speaking is a must, and English writing is preferred

Proven experience in success management, client support, or event coordination

Experience running or coordinating virtual and in-person events is a huge bonus

Comfortable managing multiple tasks and clients across different programs

Passionate about personal growth and working with a driven, motivated team

Excellent communication, follow-up, and organizational skills

Ability to think on your feet, solve problems, and lead with empathy

Familiarity with tools like GoHighLevel, Google Sheets, or Asana is a plus

Bonus: Experience working in the digital marketing, coaching, or SaaS space





If you are keen to work with our driven, collaborative and value-creating team, please complete the form below for consideration, and you will be notified once your application has been processed

title: Media Buyer (Facebook/Meta, YouTube/Google Ads)
description:
We are Singapore’s fastest growing performance marketing agency seeking



Media Buyer (Direct Response | Performance-Focused)

Full-Time | Remote



About TRES



TRES is a Singapore-based performance marketing agency working with coaches, speakers, consultants, and education businesses across Asia. We specialise in direct-response campaigns — webinars, challenges, application funnels, and high-ticket offers — where real money is spent daily and performance matters.



We’re also part of a broader group that operates:

Play Bigger Mentoring (our education & mentoring brand)

Intellia (our proprietary GoHighLevel-based CRM & funnel platform)



All brands are owned and operated by the same team. This role sits fully within the TRES performance team.





Why This Role Is Different



This is not a branding or “boost post” role.



You’ll be working on:

- Real conversion campaigns

- Meaningful daily ad spend

- Funnels where decisions have real impact



You’ll follow proven SOPs — and you’ll also be trusted to make judgment calls when performance requires it.



If you want to grow fast by working close to real data, real money, and real decisions, this role will stretch you in the right way.





What You’ll Do



- Run and optimise conversion-focused paid ad campaigns (Meta primarily & YouTube next)

- Monitor campaign performance and flag issues early

- Own campaign health, not just execution

- Follow SOPs by default and make informed adjustments when needed

- Escalate performance issues and opportunities to the Ops Manager

- Participate in scheduled weekend monitoring for selected high-spend campaigns

- Join structured ad setup / implementation sessions for mentoring and Intellia launches (scheduled, SOP-led, execution-focused)



You’ll mainly receive all priorities and inputs from a single Ops Manager — no creative or stakeholder chaos.





What You Will NOT Be Responsible For

- Writing ad copy or designing creatives

- Redesigning funnels, offers, or pricing

- Handling client communication or account management

- Juggling multiple stakeholders or unclear priorities



Your focus is campaign performance and health, with clear boundaries and structure.





Who This Role Is For

This role is a good fit if you:

- Have hands-on experience running conversion ads (leads or sales)

- Are comfortable in performance-driven environments

- Stay calm, analytical, and accountable when things move fast

- Respect structure but don’t freeze when conditions change

- Communicate clearly and take ownership seriously



Who This Role Is NOT For

- “Set-and-forget” ad managers

- Freelancers juggling multiple clients

- People looking for a low-pressure, purely 9–5 role

- Anyone uncomfortable with responsibility tied to real spend





Compensation & Growth



At TRES, compensation is more than a monthly paycheck.



You’ll be operating in an ecosystem where:

- 6-figures are spent on paid ads monthly

- Multiple six figures are invested yearly into business, operations, education, health, and performance

- Decisions are made using real data, real risk, and real outcomes



What This Means for You

- Exposure to high-spend, direct-response campaigns

- Learn world-class media buying and direct response practices

- Grow beyond ads — into business thinking, systems, and personal performance

- Performance bonuses for strong execution and decision-making

- Opportunities to join yearly team retreats and overseas events held a few times a year



If you’re looking for comfort, this isn’t it.



If you’re looking to level up fast and grow properly, you’ll thrive here.



The questions are designed to understand how you think, not just what tools you’ve used.

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



Final Note

We’re not looking for button-pushers.

We’re looking for media buyers who:

Respect structure

Protect campaign performance

Take ownership seriously

If that sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you.



How to Apply

Please complete the application form carefully.



Apply here:
