title: AI Video Editor + Photo Editor (Virtual Assistant)
description:
We’re hiring a highly skilled editor to produce polished, high-converting social media videos using AI-generated clips and avatar-based content. This is not an entry-level role. We are looking for someone fast, detail-obsessed, and capable of delivering clean, modern edits with minimal direction.



Core Responsibilities:



Generate AI video clips from photos using Grok (or similar tools)



Create avatar-based videos using HeyGen (agent headshots + voice clones)



Edit short-form videos in Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or equivalent



Combine AI clips, avatar segments, music, and motion to create engaging content



Deliver vertical videos optimized for Reels, Shorts, and TikTok



Maintain consistent style, pacing, and quality across all projects



Assist with real estate photo editing when needed (Lightroom / Photoshop)



Requirements (Do Not Apply If You Don’t Meet These):



Strong, proven video editing experience (portfolio required)



Clean, modern editing style with strong pacing and storytelling



Experience with short-form social content (fast cuts, hooks, retention focus)



Comfortable learning and using AI tools (Grok, HeyGen, etc.)



Experience with photo editing (color correction, exposure balancing, consistency)



Ability to speak, read, and write English clearly and professionally



Fast turnaround times and ability to handle volume



Excellent attention to detail and ability to follow direction exactly



Nice to Have:



After Effects or motion graphics experience



Real estate media experience



Experience working with AI-generated content



What We Care About Most:



Speed + quality



Consistency



Ability to make content feel engaging and not “AI-generated”



Application Requirements (Important):



To be considered, you must complete the test task below. Applications without it will not be reviewed.



Test Task:



Create a 20–30 second vertical real estate video using the following structure:



Use any sample property photos (your own or sourced online)



Generate at least 2–3 short AI-style video clips from still images (or simulate this if needed)



Include a talking avatar segment (HeyGen preferred; if unavailable, simulate with text overlay)



Add music, transitions, and pacing suitable for social media



Focus on a strong hook in the first 3 seconds



Goal:

Make it feel like a polished, engaging social media ad—not a slideshow.



Submit:



Final video (Google Drive or Dropbox link)



Portfolio of past work



Brief note on tools used and typical turnaround time

title: Project Based Video Editor - Commercial and Corporate
description:

Preferably available for night shift (PH time) to align with US CST operations

Primarily video production companies, agencies, and marketing teams in the United States



Key Responsibilities

 or similar review tools

2. Technical Proficiency

- Comfortable collaborating with remote teams and project managers

4. Time Management & Reliability



- Able to work efficiently and meet project deadlines



- Organized and able to manage multiple tasks when needed



5. Adaptability & Continuous Learning



- Open to feedback and improving editing workflows



- Willing to follow structured editing processes



6. Communication Skills



- Comfortable communicating in English



7. Test Edit



- Candidates must be willing to complete a paid test edit as part of the evaluation process.



How We Support Your Success

- Structured editing guidelines to streamline projects and minimize revisions



2. Access to Professional Tools



- Work with 
, Slack, Notion, and industry-standard editing software

4. Diverse Projects



- Opportunities to work on corporate, commercial, and branded content



5. Supportive Team Environment



- Work with a collaborative remote team that values reliability and quality



Why Join C3 Studios?

APPLY NOW

description:
This role is focused on operations, systems, and project management.

Your role is to oversee operations, backend systems, and launch execution for a growing digital education business in the beauty industry.

This role is focused on operations, systems, and implementation. You will be responsible for

ensuring the backend of the business runs smoothly and that campaigns, funnels, and systems

are properly set up and executed.

This is not a beginner VA role. We are looking for someone who is proactive, organized, and

comfortable managing multiple moving parts in a fast-paced online business.



ROLE RESPONSIBILITIES

Operations & Systems

• Oversee backend systems and platforms across the business

• Set up and manage funnels, upsell flows, tripwires, and backend o?ers

• Manage automations and confirmation
 setups (copy will be provided when needed)

• Ensure systems, platforms, and processes remain organized and functional

Campaign Execution

• Ensure campaign timelines are executed properly

• Prepare funnels, checkout pages, and backend systems before launches

• Monitor links, automation, and systems during campaign periods

• Keep the CEO updated on progress and deadlines

Live Event Support

• Attend live masterclasses and trainings to drop links and resources

• Ensure the backend of the event runs smoothly during live sessions

Community Oversight

• Post daily engagement messages in the community groups

• Monitor engagement and flag potential churn issues

• Support the operational side of the community

SMS Marketing

• Manage SMS reminders and text messages for launches, events, and masterclasses once the

system is set up

Operational Oversight

• Manage team coordination and ensure tasks are completed on time

• Identify backend improvements to make systems more e?cient

---

REPORTING & ACCOUNTABILITY

Campaign / Monthly Audit

At the end of each campaign (or month if no campaign is active), you will provide a short audit

covering:

• What worked well

• What could be improved

• System or process improvements for future launches

• Observations on community engagement or churn

Community Retention

Part of this role includes monitoring community churn and suggesting improvements such as:

• identifying why members may be cancelling

• suggesting automations or exit feedback messages

• recommending improvements for retention and engagement



IDEAL CANDIDATE

You are:

• Highly organized and systems-oriented

• Experienced with online business launches and funnels

• Comfortable managing multiple projects and deadlines

• Proactive and able to identify operational improvements

• Strong communicator who keeps leadership informed

Experience with platforms such as ConvertKit, Zapier, funnels, automation tools, and community

platforms is strongly preferred.



OUR GOAL

The purpose of this role is to ensure the backend of the business runs smoothly, e?ciently, and

proactively so we avoid last-minute issues and continuously improve how the business operates.



TO APPLY

Please include:

1. A short introduction about your experience

2. Examples of launches or funnels you have managed

3. The platforms and systems you are most experienced with

4. Your Portfolio



Applications without these details will not be considered.

title: Business Development Manager – Property / Landlord Acquisition (High Commission)
description:
Company Description:

Regal Realms is a fast-growing luxury Airbnb and short-let management company based in London. In just 2 years, we’ve expanded to nearly 100 premium properties and continue growing rapidly. We help landlords maximise rental income while handling everything - from guest communication and cleaning to pricing optimisation.



Check out our work: 
 and our Airbnb profile to see our portfolio of high-end properties. This is an opportunity to join a dynamic, results-driven team in the luxury property market and be part of our next phase of expansion.



Role Description:

We are looking for a hungry, commission-driven sales professional to source and close new landlord clients. You will manage the full sales cycle, from finding leads to closing deals.



Responsibilities:

* Identify and contact landlords using platforms like Rightmove, OpenRent, and LinkedIn

* Cold call,
, and message property owners

* Pitch our Airbnb management service and its income-boosting benefits

* Build relationships with landlords and property investors

* Close management agreements and hit acquisition targets



This role is fully remote. If you’re a great cold caller with property sales or closing experience, you can work from anywhere.



Qualifications:

* Sales experience in property, real estate, or B2B

* Strong communication, persuasion, and relationship-building skills

* Self-motivated, results-driven, and comfortable generating your own leads

* Familiarity with the London property market is a bonus

* Experience with CRM software



Ex-estate agents, lettings negotiators, and property BDMs are highly encouraged to apply.



Why Join Us:

* Work with high-end London properties

* Be part of a team that’s grown to nearly 100 properties in just 2 years

* Flexible, remote-friendly role

* High commission, uncapped earnings, and growth opportunities



How to Apply:

To apply, send a message answering:

1. Your sales experience and successes

2. Why you’d be great at acquiring landlords

3. A quick example of a deal you’ve closed

* Serious applicants only - we are looking for hungry closers who want to earn and grow fast, anywhere in the world.



Application Requirements:



- Keep your application message BRIEF

- Include at least one reference from a previous short-term rental company in the body of your message

Please submit a Google Drive folder containing the following:

- Your updated CV

- A minimum 1-minute video recording explaining:

---Your experience with short-term rental pricing

---Why you believe you are a good fit for this role

title: Thumbnail Artist (Part-time Job)
Virtual Assistant for College Professor
description:
Job Type: Part-Time, Remote



Job Location: Work from Home



Hours: 10 hours per week



Job Description:



We are seeking a detail-oriented and efficient Virtual Assistant to support a College Professor in managing and enhancing course materials, student interactions, and administrative tasks. The ideal candidate will be a current or past high school or college level teacher and will work with the current Virtual Assistant in various academic and administrative duties to ensure smooth and effective course delivery and academic support.



Key Responsibilities:



Course Material Management:



Incorporate student feedback, annual review feedback, and classroom evaluation feedback into course materials and the Learning Management System (LMS).

Update and enhance lectures and related content as required.



Course Administration:



Reschedule lectures in the syllabus and update them in Canvas as needed.

Create and update class syllabi in alignment with academic standards and course objectives.

Create and manage classes in Canvas, including the integration of all relevant materials.

Student Assessment and Evaluation:



Prepare and upload packets for the professor's Annual Performance Evaluation.

Calculate and record student grades, ensuring accuracy and timely reporting.

Add students to DataCamp classes and monitor their progress.

Create final exam online access and manage all aspects of exam administration.

Assist in the creation of assessment questions and grading of paper-based exams, awarding students appropriate points.

Upload and organize lecture PPTs and recordings from Spring 2023 into Canvas.

Student Progress Monitoring:



Monitor and report on students' progress throughout the course.

Provide regular updates and feedback to the professor on student performance and course engagement.

General Administrative Support:



Assist in other duties as assigned, typically associated with the role of a Virtual Assistant for a College Professor.

Ensure all tasks are completed efficiently and within set deadlines.



Qualifications:

Previous experience as a Virtual Assistant, preferably in an academic setting.

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

Proficient in using Canvas or similar Learning Management Systems.

Familiarity with DataCamp or willingness to learn.

Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) and Google Workspace.



PLEASE USE THE SUBJECT " TEACHING ASSISTANT" in your application.



PLEASE DO NOT FORGET TO INCLUDE YOUR RESUME AND PORTFOLIO (IF NECESSARY).

title: Customer Care Representative
description:
Reports to

Chief Experience Officer



About This Role

As a Customer Care Representative in the solar industry, you will be responsible for providing exceptional support to our customers throughout their journey with us. You will serve as the primary point of contact for customer inquiries and communications, ensuring timely and effective resolution of issues while enhancing the overall customer experience. This position requires strong communication skills, attention to detail, and a genuine passion for serving customers in the renewable energy sector.



Overall Responsibilities

? Check and respond promptly to all customer communications via Help
, phone calls, texts, web chat, and the Optimus portal, ensuring all inquiries are handled professionally.

? Manage account tags and touchpoints as requested by internal teams, ensuring accurate tracking and documentation of customer interactions.

? Assist in the creation of scripting, Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), Service Level Agreements (SLAs), and processes aimed at promoting customer excellence across all touchpoints.

? Collect and maintain customer experience data as requested, utilizing this information to enhance service delivery and identify areas for improvement.

? Handle escalation and resolution of customer issues, ensuring a positive experience and adherence to company policies.

? Conduct post-installation follow-up calls, checking EnFin Certificate of Completion (COC) statuses, and gathering customer feedback to rectify installation issues and address concerns regarding next steps.

? Facilitate Partial Transfer of Ownership (PTO) follow-up calls, ensuring timely updates on account movement and gathering customer feedback to gain positive reviews and referrals.

? Conduct post-PTO follow-up calls and surveys to ensure customer satisfaction, send off-boarding documents, and address any outstanding issues.

? Document customer communications, feedback, and reviews to maintain accurate records and support process improvements.

? Collaborate with tea
mbers on various projects and company initiatives, contributing to a positive work environment.

? Learn and utilize technology to improve customer experience and streamline operational processes.

? Participate in sales support tasks and training as needed, enhancing product knowledge and customer outreach skills.

? Engage in leadership development and training opportunities to foster personal and professional growth.

? Assist in the development of documents and contribute to knowledge bases related to customer service and operational best practices.

? Undertake additional tasks and projects as required by the organization, adapting to the evolving needs of the business.

Qualifications 

? High school diploma or equivalent; an associate degree or higher in a related field is a plus.

? Previous experience in customer service, preferably within the solar or renewable energy sector.

? Exceptional verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to engage effectively with customers and internal teams.

? Strong problem-solving abilities and a proactive approach to addressing customer concerns.

? Proficient in using customer relationship management (CRM) systems, call management software, and other technology to enhance customer interactions.

? Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team environment to achieve common goals.

? Strong organizational skills and attention to detail, with the capacity to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.

? A genuine passion for renewable energy and a commitment to promoting sustainability.





Legal Disclaimer

SpartanX is an Equal Opportunity Employer that values workplace diversity. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, or protected veteran status and will not be discriminated against based on disability. For more information, please visit 
.

title: Full Time Graphic Designer
description:
Summary

Tiger Companies is a leader in manufacturing and brand management, operating across multiple industries with a diverse portfolio that includes flagship retail stores and private label brands. With operations in areas like medical equipment, construction tools, ergonomic medical furniture, custom cabinetry, and janitorial supplies, Tiger Companies prides itself on its commitment to innovation, quality, and sustainability. Established in 2000 and based in NJ, the company has built a legacy of excellence across its 20+ years. We are dedicated to shaping industries, maintaining environmental consciousness, and driving sustainable practices as we continue our journey toward a brighter future.



Role Description



This is a full-time, remote role. The Graphic Designer will be responsible for creating high-quality visual designs, including graphics, logos, branding materials, and typography that align with organizational goals and brand guidelines. Daily tasks include collaborating with team members, creating design concepts, and producing materials for digital and print purposes. Attention to detail, creativity, and the ability to deliver projects within deadlines are critical for success in this role. 40 hours per week, remote.





Qualifications



End-to-End Product Design: Execute high-quality packaging, user guides, catalogs, and sell sheets using established brand templates and guidelines.

Multimedia & Visual Content: Create expert-level infographics, photo/video edits, and AI-enhanced lifestyle imagery for digital banners and product showcases.

Expertise in Graphics, Graphic Design, and creating visually appealing materials

Proficiency in Logo Design and Branding to enhance and maintain a cohesive brand identity

Strong knowledge of Typography and its application in various design projects

Proficiency in design software such as Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign)

Excellent time management skills and the ability to handle multiple projects simultaneously

Strong communication and collaboration skills to work effectively within a team

A Bachelor’s degree in Graphic Design, Visual Communication, or a related field

Experience in manufacturing, retail, or healthcare industries is a plus.

title: eCommerce Specialist
description:

title: Operations Manager for Real Estate Company in California
description:
**Position: Operations Manager (Real Estate Team | Remote – Philippines)**



The Bhagat Group is a high-performance real estate team based in the South Bay area of Los Angeles. We are looking for a **strong Operations Manager** to run the day-to-day business, build systems, and bring structure across the entire organization.



This is not an assistant role. This is a **leadership position** for someone who can take ownership, drive accountability, and scale operations.



**Important:**

This role requires **real estate operations experience**. If you have not managed operations for a real estate team or brokerage, **do not apply**. We need someone who can step in and execute immediately without training.



**Role Overview**



You will be responsible for building and managing systems across **transactions, marketing, agent support, and accountability**. Your job is to make sure the business runs efficiently without the team lead being involved in daily execution.



**Key Responsibilities**



• Oversee all day-to-day operations of the real estate team

• Build, implement, and enforce **SOPs across all departments**

• Manage transaction flow and ensure timelines and compliance are met

• Oversee TC, admin, marketing, and support staff

• Track KPIs across agents and operations

• Create systems for **lead flow, follow-up, and conversion tracking**

• Ensure CRM (Follow Up Boss or similar) is properly maintained and used

• Coordinate with vendors, marketing, and listing workflows

• Identify bottlenecks and fix inefficiencies immediately

• Hold tea
mbers accountable to performance and deadlines

• Work directly with leadership to scale the business



**Absolute Requirements**



• Proven experience as an **Operations Manager in a real estate team or brokerage**

• Deep understanding of **U.S. real estate operations and transaction flow**

• Ability to build and manage **systems, processes, and SOPs**

• Strong leadership and accountability management skills

• Must be able to operate with **minimal supervision**



**Strong Preference**



• Experience working with **California real estate teams**

• Experience with **eXp Realty systems and structure**

• Familiarity with **Follow Up Boss, SkySlope, and real estate tech stack**

• Experience managing **remote teams (especially offshore teams)**



**Core Skills**



• Systems thinker, not task executor

• Strong organizational and project management skills

• High attention to detail and process accuracy

• Data-driven decision making (KPIs, tracking, reporting)

• Excellent English communication (written and verbal)

• Ability to manage multiple moving parts at once



**Compensation**



Competitive salary based on experience and performance.



**How to Apply**



Send the following:



• Resume

• 2 minute video introduction

• Summary of your experience managing real estate operations

• List of systems and tools you have worked with



Only candidates with **real estate operations experience** will be considered.

title: Accounts Receivable Specialist
description:
About the Company/Role:



We are a dynamic and growing wholesale distribution company specializing in dropship fulfillment. Our mission is to deliver high-quality products and exceptional service to our customers, supported by strong operational and accounting processes.



We are seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Accounts Receivable Clerk to support our accounting team. This role focuses on customer account management, payment processing, and assisting with credit decisions related to customer orders.

You will work closely with our Accounts Receivable Manager and Controller to ensure customer accounts remain current and that orders are processed efficiently.



This role is best suited for someone who is organized, comfortable reviewing financial information, and able to communicate professionally with customers when needed.



Key Responsibilities:



Credit Management

• Review customer orders against their payment history, outstanding balances, and credit terms

• Make initial credit decisions regarding order releases and escalate exceptions to management when necessary

• Place or release customer accounts from credit hold as appropriate

Payment Processing

• Accept and process customer credit card payments using our internal payment procedures

• Communicate with customers regarding declined payments and assist with resolving payment issues

• Post payments accurately to customer accounts

Customer Account Support

• Manage and respond to the Accounts Receivable
 inbox

• Send customer statements and specialized reports when requested

• Communicate with customers regarding account balances and payment status when needed

Account Maintenance

• Process customer credit/debit memos

• Maintain accurate customer account records within the ERP system

Team Support

• Provide backup support to the Accounts Receivable Manager and Controller

• Assist with special projects and other accounting-related tasks as assigned

• Work with the accounting team to identify opportunities for process improvements and help implement more efficient workflows



Qualifications:



• 2+ years of experience in Accounts Receivable, bookkeeping, or accounting support

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

• Experience working with accounting software or ERP systems

• Strong Excel skills

• Excellent written English communication

• Ability to review financial information and make sound decisions



Preferred Experience:



• Experience supporting a US-based company

• Experience reviewing AR aging reports or assisting with credit decisions

• Experience working in distribution, wholesale, or product-based businesses



Technology Requirements:



This is a remote contractor role. The selected candidate must provide their own work equipment and workspace, including:



• A reliable computer capable of running modern accounting and office software

• Stable high-speed internet connection

• A quiet and professional work environment suitable for remote work



Our company will provide access to the necessary software systems, but hardware such as computers, monitors, and other equipment will not be supplied.



Work Schedule:



This position requires working overnight hours in the Philippines in order to align with our U.S.-based accounting team.

Typical working hours in the Philippines will be:



• 8:30 PM – 5:30 AM (Philippines Time) when the U.S. is on Daylight Saving Time (March – November)

• 9:30 PM – 6:30 AM (Philippines Time) when the U.S. is on Standard Time (November – March)



These hours correspond to 8:30 AM – 5:30 PM Eastern Time (U.S.), which are our company’s normal business hours.

Candidates must be comfortable working overnight hours on a consistent basis.



Industry Disclosure:



Our company operates in the specialty retail and distribution industry, supplying products that are intended for adult consumers. As a result, some product names, product descriptions, or images encountered in our systems and documents may contain adult-oriented content.



Candidates should be comfortable working in a professional environment where such products are part of the business.



Application Instructions:



When applying, please include a short paragraph describing your experience reviewing customer accounts, credit limits, or AR aging to approve or release orders.



Please begin your application with the words “AR Specialist” so we know you reviewed the full job description.

title: Virtual Assistant for Video Editing, News Research & Social Media Content
description:
We are hiring a reliable, highly detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to help support a daily social media content operation focused on Colorado crime & public safety news.



This role places a strong emphasis on short-form video editing. While part of the job is identifying 6 fresh Colorado stories each day and submitting them for approval, a major part of the role is turning approved stories into engaging social media content especially Instagram Reels and TikTok videos.



The employer will be communicating frequently, so this role is best for someone who is responsive, easy to work with, follows instructions well, and can move quickly with revisions and content production.



This position is ideal for someone who can read and understand American news, writes clearly in English, understands social media content formats, and has solid experience creating short-form videos using text overlays, narration, photos, screenshots, and background footage.



Daily Tasks:

 - Find 6 timely Colorado stories each day

 - Use credible sources such as local news sites, police and sheriff press releases, district attorney press releases, and public safety updates

 - Submit links with short summaries for approval

 - Turn approved stories into social media content for multiple platforms

 - Create text + image posts for
 and X

 - Create short-form videos for Instagram and TikTok

 - Edit videos using background footage, text overlays, photos, screenshots, captions, and narration

 - Assemble videos in a clear, engaging, fast-paced format suited for social media

 - Follow directions on tone, style, and formatting

 - Keep all content organized for fast review and posting

 - Make revisions quickly when needed



Important:

For Instagram and TikTok, video editing is a major part of this job. In many cases, there will not be original custom footage provided, so you will need to create compelling short-form videos using:



 - Colorado background footage

 - on-screen text

 - story photos or screenshots

 - subtitles/captions

 - narration or voiceover

 - simple transitions and pacing that keep viewers engaged



Requirements:

 - Excellent English comprehension and writing

 - Strong ability to read and understand American news sources

 - Strong research ability

 - Good attention to detail

 - Dependable and responsive

 - Able to follow a daily workflow

 - Comfortable handling fast-moving news topics

 - Strong short-form video editing skills

 - Able to create clean, engaging vertical videos for TikTok and Instagram

 - Comfortable receiving frequent communication and feedback from the employer



Preferred Tools/Experience:

 - Canva

 - Adobe Express or Adobe Premiere

 - CapCut

 - Google Workspace

 - Experience with social media content production

 - Experience editing short-form news, commentary, or text-based videos for social media



This role is best for someone who:

 - enjoys video editing

 - can turn simple information into polished short-form content

 - understands pacing, text placement, and viewer retention

 - can work fast without sacrificing quality

 - is comfortable with regular communication throughout the workday



To Apply, please include:

 - A short personal introduction

 - Your relevant experience

 - Samples of your video editing work

 - Your rate (hourly or monthly)

 - Your weekly availability

 - The phrase "Colorado Video Rditing & Research VA" in the first line of your application



Please also find 2 recent Colorado crime or public safety stories and send:

 - the link

 - a 1–2 sentence summary of each story

title: Part and Pricing Administrator
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Parts and Pricing Admin to join our dynamic team. This is a remote position based in the Philippines. The Parts and Pricing Admin will be responsible for ensuring vendor pricing aligns with negotiated agreements and is accurately reflected in our internal systems. The ideal candidate will excel in managing data integrity, communicating with vendors, and performing regular audits to support efficient purchasing and inventory operations. The schedule for the role is full time Monday - Friday, 8:00 am to 5:00 pm EST for 40 hours weekly.



Responsibilities:

Ensure all vendor pricing aligns with agreed-upon terms and is accurately updated in internal systems.

Monitor and validate vendor price lists against existing pricing agreements.

Communicate with vendors to resolve pricing discrepancies or unexpected price changes.

Perform regular audits to identify outdated or incorrect pricing data.

Collaborate with purchasing and inventory teams to maintain pricing consistency across platforms.

Maintain up-to-date vendor pricing files and documentation.

Provide reporting on pricing trends, variances, and audit findings.

Assist with process improvement related to pricing accuracy and vendor management.

Support the procurement and inventory team with special projects as needed.



Qualifications:



Top Must-Haves:

Strong Excel or spreadsheet skills (VLOOKUP, PivotTables)

1 year of experience with inventory or service management systems (e.g., ServiceTitan, QuickBooks, SAP)

High attention to detail and process accuracy

1 year of experience with vendor invoices (receiving and escalating issues)



Top 3 Like-to-Haves:

Experience working with vendor pricing or procurement data

Familiarity with product catalogs or SKUs

Background in supply chain, procurement, or finance



Preferred Soft Skills:

Excellent communication skills

Strong problem-solving and critical thinking

Ability to negotiate and resolve vendor issues diplomatically

Organized and self-motivated

Adaptability to changing systems or processes



Position Performance Expectations:

Maintain current and accurate vendor pricing across platforms.

Resolve pricing discrepancies quickly and effectively through vendor communication.

Execute periodic audits to ensure system accuracy and pricing integrity.

Proactively identify outdated pricing and make necessary corrections.

Generate actionable pricing reports for leadership and inventory teams.



Success Factors:

Consistency and accuracy in vendor pricing data.

Strong vendor relationships and clear communication.

Ability to catch and correct pricing errors before they impact operations.

Timely execution of audits and pricing updates.

Attention to detail and strong ownership of assigned tasks.



Availability 8:00 am–5:00 pm EST, Monday – Friday



Pay Rate: $6-$8 per hour (based on experience)

title: Customer, Lead Response & Appointment Scheduling
description:
Role Overview: 

The primary focus of this role is responding quickly to incoming leads, contacting the prospect, and booking appointments. This Virtual Assistant will monitor incoming leads, immediately call prospects, answer basic service questions, and guide them toward scheduling an estimate or service appointment. The ideal candidate is excellent on the phone, organized with CRM systems, and comfortable managing customer conversations while scheduling appointments efficiently.



Primary Responsibilities

1. Lead Response & Appointment Booking (Top Priority)

* Receive incoming leads from platforms such as:

 - Angi

 - Thumbtack

 - Google Local Services Ads (LSA)

 - Website inquiries

 - Social media inquiries

* Respond to new leads quickly to ensure fast engagement

* Call prospects to introduce the company and understand their service needs

* Answer basic service questions and handle high-level pricing conversations when appropriate

* Guide prospects toward booking:

 - In-person estimates

 - Service appointments

 - Estimates that may include same-day service if approved

* Enter and manage lead details in the CRM

* Ensure every lead receives prompt and professional follow-up

The primary goal is turning inbound leads into scheduled appointments.



2. Customer Communication & Appointment Management

* Schedule new appointments for estimates or services

* Send appointment confirmations via phone, text, or

* Follow up with customers prior to scheduled appointments

* Re-book or reschedule appointments when necessary

* Conduct post-appointment follow-ups when appropriate

* Maintain professional and friendly communication with all prospects and customers



3. CRM Management

* Manage customer records and opportunities within the CRM

* Update lead status and appointment details

* Track communications and follow-ups

* Maintain accurate and organized records

The primary CRM used is Workiz, so experience with Workiz is highly preferred. However, candidates with experience using other CRM platforms are also encouraged to apply.



Tools & Systems:

Preferred experience with:

* Workiz CRM (ideal)

* Other CRM systems (HubSpot, Jobber, ServiceTitan, Salesforce, etc.)

* Phone and SMS communication systems

* Google Workspace or Microsoft Office

* Appointment scheduling tools



Ideal Candidate Profile:

The ideal candidate will be:

* Excellent on the phone with strong communication skills

* Comfortable engaging new leads and guiding conversations toward booking

* Highly responsive and organized

* Experienced with CRM systems

* Able to manage multiple leads and follow-ups efficiently

* Professional, friendly, and customer-service oriented

* Experience supporting home services companies (cleaning, restoration, plumbing, HVAC, etc.) is a strong advantage.





To fast track your application, please submit the following information:

Resume: A link to your Google Drive. Please ensure the sharing setting is set to "Anyone with the link."



IMPORTANT REMINDER: To advance in the screening process, you must submit the Podio Form. Timely completion is essential to guarantee your application receives prompt attention.



Podio Form Link: 
/webforms/

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant
description:
Real Estate Virtual Assistant



Legacy Home Group (LHG) | Remote | Full-Time



Help us create a better client experience behind the scenes.



Legacy Home Group is looking for a dependable, detail-oriented Real Estate Virtual Assistant to support our team through two mission-critical functions: handling incoming phone calls professionally and maintaining a clean, accurate database. This role is ideal for someone who is calm under pressure, highly organized, and takes pride in helping a business run smoothly.



You will often be the first voice people hear when they contact us, so professionalism, warmth, and clear communication matter. You will also play a key role in auditing and maintaining our CRM and database so our team can operate with accuracy, speed, and confidence.



In this role, you will:

Answer incoming phone calls in a professional, courteous, and confident manner

Direct calls appropriately, take accurate messages, and ensure timely follow-up

Log call notes, inquiries, and relevant updates into our CRM/database

Review records for missing information, duplicate contacts, outdated details, and inconsistencies

Audit lead and client records to help maintain clean, organized, and usable data

Update tags, notes, lead sources, contact details, and status fields as needed

Help ensure our team has accurate information for follow-up, reporting, and client care

Communicate with tea
mbers when records need clarification or correction

Assist with light administrative support related to database upkeep and client communication

Protect confidential client and business information with care and professionalism



What success looks like:

Calls are answered promptly and handled professionally

Messages and notes are accurate, clear, and easy for the team to act on

The database stays organized, current, and reliable

Duplicate records, incomplete entries, and data errors are caught early

The team can trust the information in the CRM and move faster because of your work



You may be a strong fit if you:

Have a professional and friendly phone presence

Communicate clearly in spoken and written English

Are highly organized and naturally detail-oriented

Enjoy keeping systems accurate, clean, and well maintained

Can work independently while staying responsive to a team

Are comfortable using CRMs, spreadsheets, and communication tools

Can manage repetitive tasks with consistency and care

Understand that accuracy and follow-through matter just as much as speed



Preferred qualifications:

Experience as a virtual assistant, real estate assistant, customer service representative, or administrative assistant

Experience handling inbound calls and documenting notes accurately

Familiarity with CRM/database management and data cleanup

Real estate industry experience is a plus, but not required

Familiarity with Google Workspace, spreadsheets, and task management systems is preferred



Important notes about the role:

This is primarily an inbound phone support and database auditing position

This is not primarily a sales or cold-calling role

Candidates should be comfortable working in a structured, process-driven environment

Availability during Eastern Time business hours is preferred



Why LHG:

Legacy Home Group is committed to building a professional, supportive, and high-standard environment. We believe that excellent service begins with excellent internal operations. This role matters because it helps ensure our clients are cared for well and our team has the accurate information needed to serve them effectively.



Apply:

If you are dependable, polished, organized, and take pride in keeping communication and data accurate, we would love to hear from you.
